en.content:
Consider the reaction

$$ 2 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{~S}(\mathrm{~g})+3 \mathrm{O}_2(\mathrm{~g}) \rightarrow 2 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}(\mathrm{l})+2 \mathrm{SO}_2(\mathrm{~g}) $$

The magnitude of enthalpy change for the reaction in $\mathrm{kJ} \mathrm{mol}^{-1}$ is $\_\_\_\_$ . (Nearest integer)

$$ \begin{aligned} Given:\,\,& \Delta_{\mathrm{f}} \mathrm{H}^{\ominus}\left(\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{~S}\right)=-20.1 \mathrm{~kJ} \mathrm{~mol}^{-1} \\ & \Delta_{\mathrm{f}} \mathrm{H}^{\ominus}\left(\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}\right)=-286.0 \mathrm{~kJ} \mathrm{~mol}^{-1} \\ & \Delta_{\mathrm{f}} \mathrm{H}^{\ominus}\left(\mathrm{SO}_2\right)=-297.0 \mathrm{~kJ} \mathrm{~mol}^{-1} \end{aligned} $$
en.explanation:
We are given the reaction:

$ 2\mathrm{H}_2\mathrm{S}(g) + 3\mathrm{O}_2(g) \rightarrow 2\mathrm{H}_2\mathrm{O}(l) + 2\mathrm{SO}_2(g) $

We are also given the standard enthalpies of formation:

$ \begin{aligned} \Delta_{f}H^\circ(\mathrm{H_2S}) &= -20.1~\mathrm{kJ~mol^{-1}}\\ \Delta_{f}H^\circ(\mathrm{H_2O}) &= -286.0~\mathrm{kJ~mol^{-1}}\\ \Delta_{f}H^\circ(\mathrm{SO_2}) &= -297.0~\mathrm{kJ~mol^{-1}} \end{aligned} $

According to NCERT convention,

$ \Delta_rH^\circ = \sum \Delta_fH^\circ(\text{products}) - \sum \Delta_fH^\circ(\text{reactants}) $

Products:

$ 2\mathrm{H_2O}(l) + 2\mathrm{SO_2}(g) $

$ \sum \Delta_fH^\circ(\text{products}) = [2(-286.0) + 2(-297.0)]~\mathrm{kJ} $

$ = (-572.0 - 594.0) = -1166.0~\mathrm{kJ} $

Reactants:

$ 2\mathrm{H_2S}(g) + 3\mathrm{O_2}(g) $

$ \sum \Delta_fH^\circ(\text{reactants}) = [2(-20.1) + 3(0)]~\mathrm{kJ} = -40.2~\mathrm{kJ} $

$ \Delta_rH^\circ = (-1166.0) - (-40.2) = -1125.8~\mathrm{kJ} $

The magnitude of enthalpy change is

$ |\Delta_rH^\circ| = 1126~\mathrm{kJ~mol^{-1}} \quad (\text{nearest integer}) $

Final Answer

$ \boxed{1126~\mathrm{kJ~mol^{-1}}} $

hi.content:
अभिक्रिया पर विचार कीजिए :

$$ 2 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{~S}(\mathrm{~g})+3 \mathrm{O}_2(\mathrm{~g}) \rightarrow 2 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}(\mathrm{l})+2 \mathrm{SO}_2(\mathrm{~g}) $$

अभिक्रिया के एन्थैल्पी परिवर्तन का परिमाण $\mathrm{kJ} \mathrm{mol}^{-1}$ में है $\_\_\_\_$ । (निकटतम पूर्णांक)

दिया गया :

$$ \begin{aligned} \Delta_{\mathrm{f}} \mathrm{H}^{\ominus}\left(\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{~S}\right) & =-20.1 \mathrm{~kJ} \mathrm{~mol}^{-1} \\ \Delta_{\mathrm{f}} \mathrm{H}^{\ominus}\left(\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}\right) & =-286.0 \mathrm{~kJ} \mathrm{~mol}^{-1} \\ \Delta_{\mathrm{f}} \mathrm{H}^{\ominus}\left(\mathrm{SO}_2\right) & =-297.0 \mathrm{~kJ} \mathrm{~mol}^{-1} \end{aligned} $$
hi.explanation:
हमें निम्नलिखित अभिक्रिया दी गई है:

$ 2\mathrm{H}_2\mathrm{S}(g) + 3\mathrm{O}_2(g) \rightarrow 2\mathrm{H}_2\mathrm{O}(l) + 2\mathrm{SO}_2(g) $

हमें विरचन की मानक एन्थैल्पी (standard enthalpies of formation) भी दी गई हैं:

$ \begin{aligned} \Delta_{f}H^\circ(\mathrm{H_2S}) &= -20.1~\mathrm{kJ~mol^{-1}}\\ \Delta_{f}H^\circ(\mathrm{H_2O}) &= -286.0~\mathrm{kJ~mol^{-1}}\\ \Delta_{f}H^\circ(\mathrm{SO_2}) &= -297.0~\mathrm{kJ~mol^{-1}} \end{aligned} $

NCERT परिपाटी के अनुसार,

$ \Delta_rH^\circ = \sum \Delta_fH^\circ(\text{उत्पाद}) - \sum \Delta_fH^\circ(\text{अभिकारक}) $

उत्पाद:

$ 2\mathrm{H_2O}(l) + 2\mathrm{SO_2}(g) $

$ \sum \Delta_fH^\circ(\text{उत्पाद}) = [2(-286.0) + 2(-297.0)]~\mathrm{kJ} $

$ = (-572.0 - 594.0) = -1166.0~\mathrm{kJ} $

अभिकारक:

$ 2\mathrm{H_2S}(g) + 3\mathrm{O_2}(g) $

$ \sum \Delta_fH^\circ(\text{अभिकारक}) = [2(-20.1) + 3(0)]~\mathrm{kJ} = -40.2~\mathrm{kJ} $

$ \Delta_rH^\circ = (-1166.0) - (-40.2) = -1125.8~\mathrm{kJ} $

एन्थैल्पी परिवर्तन का परिमाण है

$ |\Delta_rH^\circ| = 1126~\mathrm{kJ~mol^{-1}} \quad (\text{निकटतम पूर्णांक}) $

अंतिम उत्तर

$ \boxed{1126~\mathrm{kJ~mol^{-1}}} $

en.content:
Solid carbon, CaO and $\mathrm{CaCO}_3$ are mixed and allowed to attain equilibrium at T K .

$$ \begin{array}{ll} \mathrm{CaCO}_3(\mathrm{~s}) \rightleftharpoons \mathrm{CaO}(\mathrm{~s})+\mathrm{CO}_2(\mathrm{~g}) & \mathrm{Kp}_1=0.08 \mathrm{~atm} \\ \mathrm{C}(\mathrm{~s})+\mathrm{CO}_2(\mathrm{~g}) \rightleftharpoons 2 \mathrm{CO}(\mathrm{~g}) & \mathrm{Kp}_2=2 \mathrm{~atm} \end{array} $$

The partial pressure of CO is __ $\times 10^{-1} \mathrm{~atm}$
en.explanation:
First, let's consider the first equilibrium:

$$ \mathrm{CaCO}_3(\mathrm{~s}) \rightleftharpoons \mathrm{CaO}(\mathrm{~s})+\mathrm{CO}_2(\mathrm{~g}) \quad K_{p_1} = 0.08 \mathrm{~atm} $$

As we know from our study of chemical equilibrium, for the equilibrium constant expression $K_p$, we only consider the partial pressures of the gaseous species. The concentrations of pure solids (like $\mathrm{CaCO}_3$ and $\mathrm{CaO}$) are considered to be unity (1).

So, for this reaction, the expression for $K_{p_1}$ is:

$$ K_{p_1} = p_{CO_2} $$

We are given that $K_{p_1} = 0.08 \mathrm{~atm}$.

Therefore, the partial pressure of $\mathrm{CO}_2$ at equilibrium is fixed by this reaction.

$$ p_{CO_2} = 0.08 \mathrm{~atm} $$

This is an important first step. The presence of both $\mathrm{CaCO}_3(\mathrm{~s})$ and $\mathrm{CaO}(\mathrm{~s})$ ensures that the partial pressure of $\mathrm{CO}_2$ is maintained at this value.

Now, let's look at the second equilibrium:

$$ \mathrm{C}(\mathrm{~s})+\mathrm{CO}_2(\mathrm{~g}) \rightleftharpoons 2 \mathrm{CO}(\mathrm{~g}) \quad K_{p_2} = 2 \mathrm{~atm} $$

Again, we write the expression for $K_{p_2}$. We consider the solid carbon, $\mathrm{C}(\mathrm{s})$, to have an activity of 1.

$$ K_{p_2} = \frac{(p_{CO})^2}{p_{CO_2}} $$

Since both reactions are taking place in the same vessel and are at equilibrium, the partial pressure of the common species, $\mathrm{CO}_2$, must be the same for both.

We have already found that $p_{CO_2} = 0.08 \mathrm{~atm}$ from the first equilibrium. We also know that $K_{p_2} = 2 \mathrm{~atm}$. Let's substitute these values into the expression for $K_{p_2}$:

$$ 2 = \frac{(p_{CO})^2}{0.08} $$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $$ (p_{CO})^2 = 2 \times 0.08 $$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $$ (p_{CO})^2 = 0.16 $$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $$ p_{CO} = \sqrt{0.16} $$

$$\Rightarrow $$$$ p_{CO} = 0.4 \mathrm{~atm} $$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $p_{CO} = 4 \times 10^{-1} \mathrm{~atm}$.

Therefore, the value to be filled in the blank is 4.

hi.content:
ठोस कार्बन, CaO और $\mathrm{CaCO}_3$ को मिलाया गया और T K पर साम्यावस्था प्राप्त करने के लिए रखा गया।

$$ \begin{array}{ll} \mathrm{CaCO}_3(\mathrm{~s}) \rightleftharpoons \mathrm{CaO}(\mathrm{~s})+\mathrm{CO}_2(\mathrm{~g}) & \mathrm{Kp}_1=0.08 \mathrm{~atm} \\ \mathrm{C}(\mathrm{~s})+\mathrm{CO}_2(\mathrm{~g}) \rightleftharpoons 2 \mathrm{CO}(\mathrm{~g}) & \mathrm{K}p_2=2 \mathrm{~atm} \end{array} $$

CO का आंशिक दाब है $\_\_\_\_$ $\times 10^{-1} \mathrm{~atm}$
hi.explanation:
सबसे पहले, आइए पहली साम्यावस्था पर विचार करते हैं:

$$ \mathrm{CaCO}_3(\mathrm{~s}) \rightleftharpoons \mathrm{CaO}(\mathrm{~s})+\mathrm{CO}_2(\mathrm{~g}) \quad K_{p_1} = 0.08 \mathrm{~atm} $$

जैसा कि हम रासायनिक साम्यावस्था के अपने अध्ययन से जानते हैं, साम्यावस्था स्थिरांक व्यंजक $K_p$ के लिए, हम केवल गैसीय स्पीशीज़ के आंशिक दाबों पर विचार करते हैं। शुद्ध ठोसों (जैसे $\mathrm{CaCO}_3$ और $\mathrm{CaO}$) की सांद्रता को इकाई (1) माना जाता है।

इसलिए, इस अभिक्रिया के लिए, $K_{p_1}$ का व्यंजक है:

$$ K_{p_1} = p_{CO_2} $$

हमें दिया गया है कि $K_{p_1} = 0.08 \mathrm{~atm}$ है।

इसलिए, साम्यावस्था पर $\mathrm{CO}_2$ का आंशिक दाब इस अभिक्रिया द्वारा निश्चित हो जाता है।

$$ p_{CO_2} = 0.08 \mathrm{~atm} $$

यह एक महत्वपूर्ण पहला कदम है। $\mathrm{CaCO}_3(\mathrm{~s})$ और $\mathrm{CaO}(\mathrm{~s})$ दोनों की उपस्थिति यह सुनिश्चित करती है कि $\mathrm{CO}_2$ का आंशिक दाब इसी मान पर बना रहे।

अब, आइए दूसरी साम्यावस्था को देखते हैं:

$$ \mathrm{C}(\mathrm{~s})+\mathrm{CO}_2(\mathrm{~g}) \rightleftharpoons 2 \mathrm{CO}(\mathrm{~g}) \quad K_{p_2} = 2 \mathrm{~atm} $$

फिर से, हम $K_{p_2}$ के लिए व्यंजक लिखते हैं। हम मानते हैं कि ठोस कार्बन, $\mathrm{C}(\mathrm{s})$, की सक्रियता 1 है।

$$ K_{p_2} = \frac{(p_{CO})^2}{p_{CO_2}} $$

चूँकि दोनों अभिक्रियाएँ एक ही पात्र में हो रही हैं और साम्यावस्था में हैं, इसलिए उभयनिष्ठ स्पीशीज़, $\mathrm{CO}_2$, का आंशिक दाब दोनों के लिए समान होना चाहिए।

हमने पहले ही पहली साम्यावस्था से ज्ञात कर लिया है कि $p_{CO_2} = 0.08 \mathrm{~atm}$ है। हम यह भी जानते हैं कि $K_{p_2} = 2 \mathrm{~atm}$ है। आइए इन मानों को $K_{p_2}$ के व्यंजक में रखते हैं:

$$ 2 = \frac{(p_{CO})^2}{0.08} $$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $$ (p_{CO})^2 = 2 \times 0.08 $$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $$ (p_{CO})^2 = 0.16 $$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $$ p_{CO} = \sqrt{0.16} $$

$$\Rightarrow $$$$ p_{CO} = 0.4 \mathrm{~atm} $$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $p_{CO} = 4 \times 10^{-1} \mathrm{~atm}$।

इसलिए, रिक्त स्थान में भरा जाने वाला मान 4 है।

en.content:
Consider the relation $R$ on the set $\{-2,-1,0,1,2\}$ defined by $(a, b) \in R$ if and only if $1+a b>0$. Then, among the statements :

I. The number of elements in R is 17

II. R is an equivalence relation
en.explanation:
We first observe the relation $\boldsymbol{R}$ defined on

$\boldsymbol{S} \times \boldsymbol{S} (\boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{b})$ is an ordered pair $\in \boldsymbol{R}$ iff $(1+\boldsymbol{a} \boldsymbol{b})>0=\boldsymbol{a} \boldsymbol{b}>-1 \ldots \ldots(\boldsymbol{i})$

Refer the chart below :

a b ab ∈ R
−2 −2 4 Yes
−1 −1 2 Yes
0 0 0 Yes
1 1 2 Yes
2 2 4 Yes
−2 −1 2 Yes
..... ..... ..... Yes
..... ..... ..... Yes

We also observe the mathematical relationship from $(\boldsymbol{i})$ :

$a b>-1 \Rightarrow b a>-1 \equiv(a, b) \in R \Rightarrow(b, a) \in R \ldots \ldots(i i) \leftarrow$ symmetric

We take 2 ordered pair entries from $\boldsymbol{R}$ :

$$ \begin{array}{|r|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|} \hline \text { Ordered pair }(\boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{b}) & (2,0) & \boldsymbol{a} \boldsymbol{b}>-1 & (0,-2) & \boldsymbol{a} \boldsymbol{b}>-1 & (2,-2) & \boldsymbol{a} \boldsymbol{b} \ngtr-1 & \text { Transitive } \\ \hline \boldsymbol{a} \boldsymbol{b} & 0 & 0>-1 & 0 & 0>-1 & -4 & -4<-1 & \\ \hline \in \boldsymbol{R} & \text { Yes } & & \text { Yes } & & \text { No } & & \text { No } \\ \hline \end{array} $$

$$\therefore $$ $$ \begin{array}{|l|l|l|l|} \hline \text { Relation } & \text { Reflexive } & \text { Symmetric } & \text { Transitive } \\ \hline \boldsymbol{R} & \text { Yes } & \text { Yes } & \text { No } \\ \hline \end{array} $$

Now let us focus on the cardinality of

$\boldsymbol{R} \in \boldsymbol{S} \times \boldsymbol{S} ;(\boldsymbol{a} \boldsymbol{b}>-1)$

S R a b No of entries Cumulative Total
{ −2, −1, 0, 1, 2 } ab > −1 −2 ∈ { −2, −1, 0 } 3 3
{ −2, −1, 0, 1, 2 } ab > −1 −1 ∈ { −2, −1, 0 } 3 6

{ −2, −1, 0, 1, 2 } ab > −1 2 ∈ { 0, 1, 2 } 3 17

$$ \begin{array}{|l|l|l|l|} \hline \mathrm{I} & \text { The number of elements in } \mathrm{R} \text { is } 17 & \text { Valid } & \text { Option } \\ \hline \mathrm{II} & \mathrm{R} \text { is an equivalence relation } & \text { Invalid } & \mathrm{A} \\ \hline \end{array} $$

हम सबसे पहले इस पर परिभाषित संबंध $ oldsymbol{R}$ का निरीक्षण करते हैं

$ oldsymbol{S} imes oldsymbol{S}$, $( oldsymbol{a}, oldsymbol{b})$ एक क्रमित युग्म $ ext{ (ordered pair) } oldsymbol{\in} oldsymbol{R}$ है यदि और केवल यदि (iff) $(1+ oldsymbol{a} oldsymbol{b})>0= oldsymbol{a} oldsymbol{b}>-1 \ldots \ldots(\boldsymbol{i})$

नीचे दिए गए चार्ट को देखें:

a b ab ∈ R

−2 −1 2 हाँ
..... ..... ..... हाँ
..... ..... ..... हाँ

हम $(\boldsymbol{i})$ से गणितीय संबंध का भी निरीक्षण करते हैं:

$a b>-1 \Rightarrow b a>-1 \equiv(a, b) \in R \Rightarrow(b, a) \in R \ldots \ldots(i i) \leftarrow \text{ सममित (symmetric) }$

हम $\boldsymbol{R}$ से 2 क्रमित युग्म प्रविष्टियाँ लेते हैं:

$$ \begin{array}{|r|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|} \hline \text { क्रमित युग्म }(\boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{b}) & (2,0) & \boldsymbol{a} \boldsymbol{b}>-1 & (0,-2) & \boldsymbol{a} \boldsymbol{b}>-1 & (2,-2) & \boldsymbol{a} \boldsymbol{b} \ngtr-1 & \text { संक्रामक (Transitive) } \\ \hline \boldsymbol{a} \boldsymbol{b} & 0 & 0>-1 & 0 & 0>-1 & -4 & -4<-1 & \\ \hline \in \boldsymbol{R} & \text { हाँ } & & \text { हाँ } & & \text { नहीं } & & \text { नहीं } \\ \hline \end{array} $$

$$\therefore $$ $$ \begin{array}{|l|l|l|l|} \hline \text { संबंध } & \text { स्वतुल्य (Reflexive) } & \text { सममित (Symmetric) } & \text { संक्रामक (Transitive) } \\ \hline \boldsymbol{R} & \text { हाँ } & \text { हाँ } & \text { नहीं } \\ \hline \end{array} $$

अब हम निम्न की गणन संख्या (cardinality) पर ध्यान देते हैं:

en.content: The number of values of $z \in \mathbb{C}$, satisfying the equations $|z-(4+8 i)|=\sqrt{10}$ and $|z-(3+5 i)|+|z-(5+11 i)|=4 \sqrt{5}$, is $:$
en.explanation:
$$ |z-(3+5 i)|+|z-(5+11 i)|=4 \sqrt{5} $$

So, $\mathrm{S}_1(3,5) \& \mathrm{~S}_2(5,11)$ are two foci of ellipse, where $2 \mathrm{ae}=\mathrm{S}_1 \mathrm{~S}_2=2 \sqrt{10} \& 2 \mathrm{a}=4 \sqrt{5}$

$$ \Rightarrow \mathrm{a}=2 \sqrt{5}, \mathrm{e}=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \& \mathrm{~b}^2=\mathrm{a}^2\left(1-\mathrm{e}^2\right) \text { gives } \mathrm{b}^2=10 $$

$\&$ center of an ellipse is mid point of both focus

∴ center $(4,8)$

Equation of circle is $|\mathrm{Z}-(4+8 \mathrm{i})|=\sqrt{10}$

⇒ Ellipse $\&$ given circle are concentric \& radius of given circle is equal to length of minor axis of given ellipse

⇒ Two points which are common to both.

hi.content: $z \in \mathbb{C}$ के मानों, जो समीकरणों $|z-(4+8 i)|=\sqrt{10}$ और $|z-(3+5 i)|+|z-(5+11 i)|=4 \sqrt{5}$ को संतुष्ट करते हैं, की संख्या है :
hi.explanation:
$$ |z-(3+5 i)|+|z-(5+11 i)|=4 \sqrt{5} $$

इसलिए, $\mathrm{S}_1(3,5) \& \mathrm{~S}_2(5,11)$ दीर्घवृत्त की दो नाभियाँ (foci) हैं, जहाँ $2 \mathrm{ae}=\mathrm{S}_1 \mathrm{~S}_2=2 \sqrt{10} \& 2 \mathrm{a}=4 \sqrt{5}$ है

$$ \Rightarrow \mathrm{a}=2 \sqrt{5}, \mathrm{e}=\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \& \mathrm{~b}^2=\mathrm{a}^2\left(1-\mathrm{e}^2\right) \text { से } \mathrm{b}^2=10 \text{ प्राप्त होता है} $$

$\&$ दीर्घवृत्त का केंद्र दोनों नाभियों का मध्य बिंदु होता है

∴ केंद्र $(4,8)$

वृत्त का समीकरण $|\mathrm{Z}-(4+8 \mathrm{i})|=\sqrt{10}$ है

⇒ दीर्घवृत्त $\&$ दिया गया वृत्त संकेंद्री (concentric) हैं \& दिए गए वृत्त की त्रिज्या दिए गए दीर्घवृत्त के लघु अक्ष (minor axis) की लंबाई के बराबर है

⇒ अतः दो बिंदु ऐसे हैं जो दोनों में उभयनिष्ठ (common) हैं।

en.content:
If the system of linear equations :

$$ \begin{aligned} & x+y+z=6 \\ & x+2 y+5 z=10 \\ & 2 x+3 y+\lambda z=\mu \end{aligned} $$

has infinitely many solutions, then the value of $\lambda+\mu$ equals:
en.explanation:
To find the condition for infinitely many solutions, we first calculate the determinant $ D $ of the coefficients of $ x, y, z $:

$$ D=\left|\begin{array}{lll} 1 & 1 & 1 \\ 1 & 2 & 5 \\ 2 & 3 & \lambda \end{array}\right| =\lambda - 6 $$

For infinitely many solutions, $ D = 0 $. So, $ \lambda - 6 = 0 \Rightarrow \lambda = 6. $

Now, let us find $ D_1 $, the determinant obtained by replacing the first column with the constants:

$$ D_1=\left|\begin{array}{ccc} 6 & 1 & 1 \\ 10 & 2 & 5 \\ \mu & 3 & \lambda \end{array}\right| =2\lambda + 3\mu - 60 $$

Next, the determinant $ D_2 $ is obtained by replacing the second column with the constants:

$$ D_2=\left|\begin{array}{ccc} 1 & 6 & 1 \\ 1 & 10 & 5 \\ 2 & \mu & \lambda \end{array}\right| =4(\lambda - \mu + 10) $$

Finally, $ D_3 $ is obtained by replacing the third column with the constants:

$$ D_3=\left|\begin{array}{ccc} 1 & 1 & 6 \\ 1 & 2 & 10 \\ 2 & 3 & \mu \end{array}\right| =\mu - 16 $$

For the system to have infinitely many solutions, all the determinants must be zero:

$$ D = D_1 = D_2 = D_3 = 0 $$

Substitute $ \lambda = 6 $:

From $ D_3 = 0 $, $ \mu - 16 = 0 \Rightarrow \mu = 16. $

Thus,

$$ \lambda + \mu = 6 + 16 = 22 $$

hi.content:
यदि रैखिक समीकरण निकाय

$$ \begin{aligned} & x+y+z=6 \\ & x+2 y+5 z=10 \\ & 2 x+3 y+\lambda z=\mu \end{aligned} $$

के अनंत हल हैं, तो $\lambda+\mu$ का मान बराबर है :
hi.explanation:
अनंत हलों (infinitely many solutions) के लिए शर्त ज्ञात करने के लिए, हम सबसे पहले $ x, y, z $ के गुणांकों का सारणिक (determinant) $ D $ निकालते हैं:

$$ D=\left|\begin{array}{lll} 1 & 1 & 1 \\ 1 & 2 & 5 \\ 2 & 3 & \lambda \end{array}\right| =\lambda - 6 $$

अनंत हलों के लिए, $ D = 0 $। अतः, $ \lambda - 6 = 0 \Rightarrow \lambda = 6. $

अब, हम $ D_1 $ ज्ञात करते हैं, जो पहले स्तंभ को अचर पदों (constants) से प्रतिस्थापित करने पर प्राप्त होने वाला सारणिक है:

$$ D_1=\left|\begin{array}{ccc} 6 & 1 & 1 \\ 10 & 2 & 5 \\ \mu & 3 & \lambda \end{array}\right| =2\lambda + 3\mu - 60 $$

इसके बाद, दूसरे स्तंभ को अचर पदों से प्रतिस्थापित करने पर सारणिक $ D_2 $ प्राप्त होता है:

$$ D_2=\left|\begin{array}{ccc} 1 & 6 & 1 \\ 1 & 10 & 5 \\ 2 & \mu & \lambda \end{array}\right| =4(\lambda - \mu + 10) $$

अंत में, तीसरे स्तंभ को अचर पदों से प्रतिस्थापित करने पर $ D_3 $ प्राप्त होता है:

$$ D_3=\left|\begin{array}{ccc} 1 & 1 & 6 \\ 1 & 2 & 10 \\ 2 & 3 & \mu \end{array}\right| =\mu - 16 $$

निकाय के अनंत हल होने के लिए, सभी सारणिक शून्य होने चाहिए:

$$ D = D_1 = D_2 = D_3 = 0 $$

$ \lambda = 6 $ प्रतिस्थापित करने पर:

$ D_3 = 0 $ से, $ \mu - 16 = 0 \Rightarrow \mu = 16. $

अतः,

$$ \lambda + \mu = 6 + 16 = 22 $$

en.content: Let $A=\left[\begin{array}{lll}\alpha & 1 & 2 \\ 2 & 3 & 0 \\ 0 & 4 & 5\end{array}\right]$ and $B=\left[\begin{array}{ccc}1 & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & -5 \alpha & 0 \\ 0 & 4 \alpha & -2 \alpha\end{array}\right]+\operatorname{adj}(A)$. If $\operatorname{det}(B)=66$, then $\operatorname{det}(\operatorname{adj}(A))$ equals :
en.explanation:
$A=\left[\begin{array}{lll}\alpha & 1 & 2 \\ 2 & 3 & 0 \\ 0 & 4 & 5\end{array}\right]$

$\Rightarrow|\boldsymbol{A}|=15 \boldsymbol{\alpha}-10+16=15 \boldsymbol{\alpha}+6$

Now adj $A=\left[\begin{array}{ccc}15 & 3 & -6 \\ -10 & 5 \alpha & 4 \\ 8 & -4 \alpha & 3 \alpha-2\end{array}\right]$

$\therefore \mathrm{B}=\left[\begin{array}{ccc}1 & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & -5 \alpha & 0 \\ 0 & 4 \alpha & -2 \alpha\end{array}\right]+\operatorname{adj}(\mathrm{A})$

$B=\left[\begin{array}{ccc}16 & 3 & -6 \\ -10 & 0 & 4 \\ 8 & 0 & \alpha-2\end{array}\right]$

$\begin{aligned} & \&|\mathrm{~B}|=6(5 \alpha+6)=66 \text { (given in question) } \\ & \Rightarrow \alpha=1 \\ & \Rightarrow|\mathrm{~A}|=21\end{aligned}$

$\boldsymbol{A} \cdot \operatorname{Adj}(\boldsymbol{A})=|\boldsymbol{A}| \boldsymbol{I} \Rightarrow|\boldsymbol{A} \cdot \operatorname{Adj}(\boldsymbol{A})|=\| \boldsymbol{A}|\boldsymbol{I}|=\left(|\boldsymbol{A}|^3\right)|\boldsymbol{I}|=|\boldsymbol{A}|^3$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $|\boldsymbol{A}||\operatorname{Adj}(\boldsymbol{A})|=|\boldsymbol{A}|^3 \Rightarrow|\operatorname{Adj}(\boldsymbol{A})|=|\boldsymbol{A}|^2=(21)^2=441$

hi.content: माना $\mathrm{A}=\left[\begin{array}{lll}\alpha & 1 & 2 \\ 2 & 3 & 0 \\ 0 & 4 & 5\end{array}\right]$ और $\mathrm{B}=\left[\begin{array}{ccc}1 & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & -5 \alpha & 0 \\ 0 & 4 \alpha & -2 \alpha\end{array}\right]+\operatorname{adj}(\mathrm{A})$ हैं। यदि $\operatorname{det}(\mathrm{B})=66$ है, तो $\operatorname{det}(\operatorname{adj}(\mathrm{A}))$ बराबर है :

$\boldsymbol{A} \cdot \operatorname{Adj}(\boldsymbol{A})=|\boldsymbol{A}| \boldsymbol{I} \Rightarrow|\boldsymbol{A} \cdot \operatorname{Adj}(\boldsymbol{A})|=\| \boldsymbol{A}|\boldsymbol{I}|=\left(|\boldsymbol{A}|^3\right)|\boldsymbol{I}|=|\boldsymbol{A}|^3$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $|\boldsymbol{A}||\operatorname{Adj}(\boldsymbol{A})|=|\boldsymbol{A}|^3 \Rightarrow|\operatorname{Adj}(\boldsymbol{A})|=|\boldsymbol{A}|^2=(21)^2=441$

en.content: Let $\alpha=3+4+8+9+13+14+\ldots$ upto 40 terms. If $(\tan \beta)^{\frac{\alpha}{1020}}$ is a root of the equation $x^2+x-2=0, \beta \in\left(0, \frac{\pi}{2}\right)$, then $\sin ^2 \beta+3 \cos ^2 \beta$ is equal to :
en.explanation:
1. 1. A series sum is defined : $\boldsymbol{\alpha}=3+4+8+9+13+14+\ldots . . \boldsymbol{t}_{40}$

  2. 2. $(\tan \boldsymbol{\beta})^{\frac{\alpha}{1020}}$ is a root of the quadratic equation $\boldsymbol{x}^2+\boldsymbol{x}-2=0$ where $\boldsymbol{\beta} \in\left(0, \frac{\boldsymbol{\pi}}{2}\right)$

  3. 3. To evaluate the expression $\sin ^2 \beta+3 \cos ^2 \beta$

$$\therefore $$ $\boldsymbol{\alpha}=3+4+8+9+13+14+\ldots . . \boldsymbol{t}_{40}$

$=7+17+27+\ldots . .+\boldsymbol{T}_{20}$

$=\frac{20}{2}\{(2) \cdot(7)+(20-1) \cdot(10)\}$

$=(10) \cdot(14+190)=2,040 \ldots \ldots(\boldsymbol{i})$

Equation (i) gives the value of $\alpha=2,040$ :

$$ (\tan \beta)^{\frac{\alpha}{1020}}=(\tan \beta)^{\frac{2040}{1020}}=\tan ^2 \beta \ldots \ldots(i i) $$

Now let us solve the quadratic equation $x^2+x-2=0$ :

$x^2+x-2=0 \Rightarrow x^2+2 x-x-2=0 \Rightarrow(x+2)(x-1)=0$

$$ \Rightarrow \begin{array}{|l|l|} \hline p & q \\ \hline-2 & 1 \\ \hline \end{array} $$

where $\boldsymbol{p}$ and $\boldsymbol{q}$ are the roots

We have derived in equation $(i i)(\tan \beta)^{\frac{\alpha}{1020}}=\tan ^2 \beta$ which is also a root of the equation $x^2+x-2=0$ :

From the pair of roots we get $\tan ^2 \beta$ =1$ \Rightarrow \tan \beta= \pm 1 $ As $ \tan ^2 \beta \geqslant 0$ always

$\boldsymbol{\beta} \in\left(0, \frac{\pi}{2}\right) \Rightarrow \tan \boldsymbol{\beta}=1 \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{\beta}=\frac{\pi}{4}$

$\Rightarrow \sin ^2 \beta+3 \cos ^2 \beta=\sin ^2 \frac{\pi}{4}+3 \cos ^2 \frac{\pi}{4}=\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)+\left(\frac{3}{2}\right)=2$

hi.content: माना $\alpha=3+4+8+9+13+14+\ldots 40$ पदों तक है। यदि समीकरण $x^2+x-2=0$, का एक मूल $(\tan \beta)^{\frac{\alpha}{1020}}$, $\beta \in\left(0, \frac{\pi}{2}\right)$, है, तो $\sin ^2 \beta+3 \cos ^2 \beta$ बराबर है :
hi.explanation:
1. 1. एक श्रेणी का योग परिभाषित किया गया है : $\boldsymbol{\alpha}=3+4+8+9+13+14+\ldots . . \boldsymbol{t}_{40}$

  2. 2. $(\tan \boldsymbol{\beta})^{\frac{\alpha}{1020}}$ द्विघात समीकरण $\boldsymbol{x}^2+\boldsymbol{x}-2=0$ का एक मूल है जहाँ $\boldsymbol{\beta} \in\left(0, \frac{\boldsymbol{\pi}}{2}\right)$

  3. 3. व्यंजक $\sin ^2 \beta+3 \cos ^2 \beta$ का मान ज्ञात करना है

$$\therefore $$ $\boldsymbol{\alpha}=3+4+8+9+13+14+\ldots . . \boldsymbol{t}_{40}$

$=7+17+27+\ldots . .+\boldsymbol{T}_{20}$

$=\frac{20}{2}\{(2) \cdot(7)+(20-1) \cdot(10)\}$

$=(10) \cdot(14+190)=2,040 \ldots \ldots(\boldsymbol{i})$

समीकरण (i) से $\alpha=2,040$ का मान प्राप्त होता है :

$$ (\tan \beta)^{\frac{\alpha}{1020}}=(\tan \beta)^{\frac{2040}{1020}}=\tan ^2 \beta \ldots \ldots(i i) $$

अब हम द्विघात समीकरण $x^2+x-2=0$ को हल करते हैं :

$x^2+x-2=0 \Rightarrow x^2+2 x-x-2=0 \Rightarrow(x+2)(x-1)=0$

$$ \Rightarrow \begin{array}{|l|l|} \hline p & q \\\\ \hline-2 & 1 \\\\ \hline \end{array} $$

जहाँ $\boldsymbol{p}$ और $\boldsymbol{q}$ मूल हैं

हमने समीकरण $(i i)$ में $(\tan \beta)^{\frac{\alpha}{1020}}=\tan ^2 \beta$ प्राप्त किया है जो समीकरण $x^2+x-2=0$ का एक मूल भी है :

मूलों के युग्म से हमें $\tan ^2 \beta$ =1$ \Rightarrow \tan \beta= \pm 1 $ प्राप्त होता है चूँकि $ \tan ^2 \beta \geqslant 0$ हमेशा होता है

$\boldsymbol{\beta} \in\left(0, \frac{\pi}{2}\right) \Rightarrow \tan \boldsymbol{\beta}=1 \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{\beta}=\frac{\pi}{4}$

$\Rightarrow \sin ^2 \beta+3 \cos ^2 \beta=\sin ^2 \frac{\pi}{4}+3 \cos ^2 \frac{\pi}{4}=\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)+\left(\frac{3}{2}\right)=2$

en.content: A candidate has to go to the examination centre to appear in an examination. The candidate uses only one means of transportation for the entire distance out of bus, scooter and car. The probabilities of the candidate going by bus, scooter and car, respectively, are $\frac{2}{5}, \frac{1}{5}$ and $\frac{2}{5}$. The probabilities that the candidate reaches late at the examination centre are $\frac{1}{5}, \frac{1}{3}$ and $\frac{1}{4}$ if the candidate uses bus, scooter and car, respectively. Given that the candidate reached late at the examination centre, the probability that the candidate travelled by bus is :
en.explanation:
$$ \begin{array}{|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|} \hline \text { Conveyance } & \text { Bus } & \text { Scooter } & \text { Car } & \text { Arrive late } & \text { Bus } & \text { Scooter } & \text { Car } \\ \hline \text { Probability } & \frac{2}{5} & \frac{1}{5} & \frac{2}{5} & \text { Probability } & \frac{1}{5} & \frac{1}{3} & \frac{1}{4} \\ \hline \end{array} $$

$$ \begin{aligned} &\text { We label the events in the chart below : }\\ &\begin{array}{|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|} \hline \text { Conveyance } & \text { Bus } & \text { Scooter } & \text { Car } & \text { Arrive late by } & \text { Bus } & \text { Scooter } & \text { Car } \\ \hline \text { Event } & B & S & C & \text { Event } & \boldsymbol{L}_b & L_s & \boldsymbol{L}_c \\ \hline \end{array} \end{aligned} $$

We label the event that the candidate arrives late be $\boldsymbol{L}$

$$ \begin{array}{|l|c|c|c|c|c|c|} \hline \text { Event } & \boldsymbol{B} & \boldsymbol{S} & \boldsymbol{C} & \boldsymbol{L}_b & \boldsymbol{L}_s & \boldsymbol{L}_c \\ \hline \text { Probability } & \frac{2}{5} & \frac{1}{5} & \frac{2}{5} & \frac{1}{5} & \frac{1}{3} & \frac{1}{4} \\ \hline \end{array} $$

$\Rightarrow P(L \cap B)=P(L) \cdot P(B / L)=P(B \cap L)$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $P(B / L)=\frac{P(B \cap L)}{P(L)}$

$=\frac{P(B) \cdot P(L / B)}{P(B \cap L)+P(S \cap L)+P(C \cap L)}$

$=\frac{P(B) \cdot P(L / B)}{P(B) \cdot P(L / B)+P(S) \cdot P(L / S)+P(C) \cdot P(C / B)}$

$P(B / L)=\frac{P(B) \cdot P\left(L_b\right)}{P(B) \cdot P\left(L_b\right)+P(S) \cdot P\left(L_s\right)+P(C) \cdot P\left(L_c\right)}$

$=\frac{\left(\frac{2}{5}\right) \cdot\left(\frac{1}{5}\right)}{\left(\frac{2}{5}\right) \cdot\left(\frac{1}{5}\right)+\left(\frac{1}{5}\right) \cdot\left(\frac{1}{3}\right)+\left(\frac{2}{5}\right) \cdot\left(\frac{1}{4}\right)}$

$=\left(\frac{2}{25}\right) \cdot\left(\frac{300}{24+20+30}\right)=\frac{12}{37}$

hi.content: एक परीक्षार्थी को परीक्षा केंद्र में परीक्षा देने के लिए जाना है। पूरी दूरी के लिए परीक्षार्थी बस, स्कूटर और कार में से परिवहन का केवल एक ही साधन प्रयोग करता है। परीक्षार्थी के बस, स्कूटर और कार से जाने की प्रायिकताएँ क्रमशः $\frac{2}{5}, \frac{1}{5}$ और $\frac{2}{5}$ हैं। यदि परीक्षार्थी बस, स्कूटर और कार का प्रयोग करता है, तो उसके परीक्षा केंद्र में देरी से पहुँचने की प्रायिकताएँ क्रमशः $\frac{1}{5}, \frac{1}{3}$ और $\frac{1}{4}$ हैं। दिया गया है कि परीक्षार्थी परीक्षा केंद्र पर देरी से पहुँचा है, तो उसके बस से जाने की प्रायिकता है :
hi.explanation:
$$ \begin{array}{|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|} \hline \text { वाहन } & \text { बस } & \text { स्कूटर } & \text { कार } & \text { देरी से पहुँचना } & \text { बस } & \text { स्कूटर } & \text { कार } \\ \hline \text { प्रायिकता } & \frac{2}{5} & \frac{1}{5} & \frac{2}{5} & \text { प्रायिकता } & \frac{1}{5} & \frac{1}{3} & \frac{1}{4} \\ \hline \end{array} $$

$$ \begin{aligned} &\text { हम नीचे दिए गए चार्ट में घटनाओं को निरूपित करते हैं: }\\ &\begin{array}{|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|} \hline \text { वाहन } & \text { बस } & \text { स्कूटर } & \text { कार } & \text { देरी से पहुँचना } & \text { बस } & \text { स्कूटर } & \text { कार } \\ \hline \text { घटना } & B & S & C & \text { घटना } & \boldsymbol{L}_b & L_s & \boldsymbol{L}_c \\ \hline \end{array} \end{aligned} $$

हम उम्मीदवार के देरी से पहुँचने की घटना को $\boldsymbol{L}$ से निरूपित करते हैं

$$ \begin{array}{|l|c|c|c|c|c|c|} \hline \text { घटना } & \boldsymbol{B} & \boldsymbol{S} & \boldsymbol{C} & \boldsymbol{L}_b & \boldsymbol{L}_s & \boldsymbol{L}_c \\ \hline \text { प्रायिकता } & \frac{2}{5} & \frac{1}{5} & \frac{2}{5} & \frac{1}{5} & \frac{1}{3} & \frac{1}{4} \\ \hline \end{array} $$

$\Rightarrow P(L \cap B)=P(L) \cdot P(B / L)=P(B \cap L)$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $P(B / L)=\frac{P(B \cap L)}{P(L)}$

$=\frac{P(B) \cdot P(L / B)}{P(B \cap L)+P(S \cap L)+P(C \cap L)}$

$=\frac{P(B) \cdot P(L / B)}{P(B) \cdot P(L / B)+P(S) \cdot P(L / S)+P(C) \cdot P(C / B)}$

$P(B / L)=\frac{P(B) \cdot P\left(L_b\right)}{P(B) \cdot P\left(L_b\right)+P(S) \cdot P\left(L_s\right)+P(C) \cdot P\left(L_c\right)}$

$=\frac{\left(\frac{2}{5}\right) \cdot\left(\frac{1}{5}\right)}{\left(\frac{2}{5}\right) \cdot\left(\frac{1}{5}\right)+\left(\frac{1}{5}\right) \cdot\left(\frac{1}{3}\right)+\left(\frac{2}{5}\right) \cdot\left(\frac{1}{4}\right)}$

$=\left(\frac{2}{25}\right) \cdot\left(\frac{300}{24+20+30}\right)=\frac{12}{37}$

en.content: A set of four observations has mean 1 and variance 13. Another set of six observations has mean 2 and variance 1 . Then, the variance of all these 10 observations is equal to :
en.explanation:
$$ \begin{array}{|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|} \hline \text { Observation } & \boldsymbol{x}_1 & \boldsymbol{x}_2 & \boldsymbol{x}_3 & \boldsymbol{x}_4 & \boldsymbol{n} & \text { Observation } & \boldsymbol{y}_1 & \boldsymbol{y}_2 & \boldsymbol{y}_3 & \boldsymbol{y}_4 & \boldsymbol{y}_5 & \boldsymbol{y}_6 & \boldsymbol{n} \\ \hline \text { Set } & 1 & 1 & 1 & 1 & 4 & \text { Set } & 2 & 2 & 2 & 2 & 2 & 2 & 6 \\ \hline \end{array} $$

$$ \text { Set } 1 \rightrightarrows \mu_x=\frac{\sum\limits_{i=1}^4 x_i}{4}=1 \ldots . (i) $$

$\sigma_x^2=\left\lfloor\left(\frac{\sum\limits_{i=1}^4 x_i^2}{4}\right)-\mu_x^2\right\rfloor=13 \ldots \ldots(i i)$

Set $2 \rightrightarrows \mu_y=\frac{\sum\limits_{j=1}^6 y_j}{6}=2 \ldots \ldots(i i i)$

$\sigma_y^2=\left[\left(\frac{\sum\limits_{j=1}^6 y_j^2}{6}\right)-\mu_y^2\right]=1 \ldots \ldots(i v)$

We mathematically extract from equations $(i)$ and $(i i)$ :

$$ \sum\limits_{i=1}^4 x_i=4 \ldots .(\boldsymbol{v}) \quad \sum\limits_{i=1}^4 x_i^2=4\left(\mu_x^2+13\right)=4(1+13)=56 \ldots \ldots(\boldsymbol{v} \boldsymbol{i}) $$

We mathematically extract from equations (iii) and (iv) :

$$ \sum\limits_{j=1}^6 \boldsymbol{y}_j=12 \ldots .(\boldsymbol{v i i}) \quad \sum\limits_{j=1}^6 y_j^2=6\left(\boldsymbol{\mu}_y^2+1\right)=6(4+1)=30 \ldots \ldots(\boldsymbol{v i i i}) $$

We have mathematically compiled a summary of all the information in equations (v) through (viii) to compute the mean and the variance for the 10 datapoints in set $1 \cup$ set 2 :

$\mu_t=\frac{\sum\limits_{i=1}^4 x_i+\sum\limits_{j=1}^6 y_j}{4+6}=\frac{4+12}{10}=1.6 \ldots . .(\boldsymbol{i x})$

$\sigma_t^2=\left[\left(\frac{\sum_{i=1}^4 \boldsymbol{x}_i^2+\sum_{j=1}^6 \boldsymbol{y}_j^2}{4+6}\right)-\boldsymbol{\mu}_t^2\right]$

$=\frac{56+30}{4+6}-\begin{gathered} (1.6)^2\end{gathered}$

$=8.6-2.56=6.04$

hi.content: चार प्रेक्षणों के एक समूह का माध्य 1 और प्रसरण 13 हैं। छह प्रेक्षणों के एक अन्य समूह का माध्य 2 और प्रसरण 1 है। तो इन सभी 10 प्रेक्षणों का प्रसरण है :
hi.explanation:
$$ \begin{array}{|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|} \hline \text { प्रेक्षण } & \boldsymbol{x}_1 & \boldsymbol{x}_2 & \boldsymbol{x}_3 & \boldsymbol{x}_4 & \boldsymbol{n} & \text { प्रेक्षण } & \boldsymbol{y}_1 & \boldsymbol{y}_2 & \boldsymbol{y}_3 & \boldsymbol{y}_4 & \boldsymbol{y}_5 & \boldsymbol{y}_6 & \boldsymbol{n} \\ \hline \text { समुच्चय } & 1 & 1 & 1 & 1 & 4 & \text { समुच्चय } & 2 & 2 & 2 & 2 & 2 & 2 & 6 \\ \hline \end{array} $$

$$ \text { समुच्चय } 1 \rightrightarrows \mu_x=\frac{\sum\limits_{i=1}^4 x_i}{4}=1 \ldots . (i) $$

$\sigma_x^2=\left\lfloor\left(\frac{\sum\limits_{i=1}^4 x_i^2}{4}\right)-\mu_x^2\right\rfloor=13 \ldots \ldots(i i)$

समुच्चय $2 \rightrightarrows \mu_y=\frac{\sum\limits_{j=1}^6 y_j}{6}=2 \ldots \ldots(i i i)$

$\sigma_y^2=\left[\left(\frac{\sum\limits_{j=1}^6 y_j^2}{6}\right)-\mu_y^2\right]=1 \ldots \ldots(i v)$

हम समीकरण $(i)$ और $(i i)$ से गणितीय रूप से प्राप्त करते हैं:

$$ \sum\limits_{i=1}^4 x_i=4 \ldots .(\boldsymbol{v}) \quad \sum\limits_{i=1}^4 x_i^2=4\left(\mu_x^2+13\right)=4(1+13)=56 \ldots \ldots(\boldsymbol{v} \boldsymbol{i}) $$

हम समीकरण (iii) और (iv) से गणितीय रूप से प्राप्त करते हैं:

$$ \sum\limits_{j=1}^6 \boldsymbol{y}_j=12 \ldots .(\boldsymbol{v i i}) \quad \sum\limits_{j=1}^6 y_j^2=6\left(\boldsymbol{\mu}_y^2+1\right)=6(4+1)=30 \ldots \ldots(\boldsymbol{v i i i}) $$

समुच्चय $1 \cup$ समुच्चय $2$ के 10 डेटा बिंदुओं के लिए माध्य और प्रसरण की गणना करने हेतु, हमने समीकरण (v) से (viii) तक की सभी जानकारियों का गणितीय रूप से एक सारांश संकलित किया है:

$\mu_t=\frac{\sum\limits_{i=1}^4 x_i+\sum\limits_{j=1}^6 y_j}{4+6}=\frac{4+12}{10}=1.6 \ldots . .(\boldsymbol{i x})$

$\sigma_t^2=\left[\left(\frac{\sum_{i=1}^4 \boldsymbol{x}_i^2+\sum_{j=1}^6 \boldsymbol{y}_j^2}{4+6}\right)-\boldsymbol{\mu}_t^2\right]$

$=\frac{56+30}{4+6}-\begin{gathered} (1.6)^2\end{gathered}$

$=8.6-2.56=6.04$

en.content: If $26\left(\frac{2^3}{3}\left({ }^{12} \mathrm{C}_2\right)+\frac{2^5}{5}\left({ }^{12} \mathrm{C}_4\right)+\frac{2^7}{7}\left({ }^{12} \mathrm{C}_6\right)+\cdots+\frac{2^{13}}{13}\left({ }^{12} \mathrm{C}_{12}\right)\right)=3^{13}-\alpha$, then $\alpha$ is equal to :
en.explanation:
$\boldsymbol{S}_{\boldsymbol{r}}=26\left[\left(\frac{2^3}{3}\right) \cdot\left({ }^{12} \boldsymbol{C}_2\right)+\left(\frac{2^5}{5}\right) \cdot\left({ }^{12} \boldsymbol{C}_4\right)+\left(\frac{2^7}{7}\right) \cdot\left({ }^{12} \boldsymbol{C}_6\right)+\left(\frac{2^9}{9}\right) \cdot\left({ }^{12} \boldsymbol{C}_8\right)+\ldots .+\left(\frac{2^{13}}{13}\right) \cdot\left({ }^{12} \boldsymbol{C}_{12}\right)\right]$

$=26\left[\sum\limits_{r=1}^6\left(\frac{2^{2 r+1}}{2 r+1}\right) \cdot\left({ }^{12} \boldsymbol{C}_{2 r}\right)\right]$.

$\boldsymbol{S}_{\boldsymbol{r}}=\frac{26}{13}\left[\sum\limits_{r=1}^6\left(2^{2 r+1}\right) \cdot\left({ }^{13} \boldsymbol{C}_{2 r+1}\right)\right]$

$=2\left[\sum\limits_{r=0}^6\left(2^{2 r+1}\right) \cdot\left({ }^{13} \boldsymbol{C}_{2 r+1}\right)-\left({ }^{13} \boldsymbol{C}_1\right) \cdot 2^1\right]$

$=2\left[\sum\limits_{r=0}^6\left(2^{2 r+1}\right) \cdot\left({ }^{13} C_{2 r+1}\right)\right]-52$

$\begin{aligned} \boldsymbol{S}_{\boldsymbol{r}} & =2\left[\left({ }^{13} \boldsymbol{C}_1\right) \cdot 2^1+\left({ }^{13} \boldsymbol{C}_3\right) \cdot 2^3+\left({ }^{13} \boldsymbol{C}_5\right) \cdot 2^5+\left({ }^{13} \boldsymbol{C}_7\right) \cdot 2^7+\ldots . .+\left({ }^{13} \boldsymbol{C}_{13}\right) \cdot 2^{13}\right]-52 \\ & =(1+2)^{13}-(1-2)^{13}-52 \\ & =3^{13}+1-52 \\ & =3^{13}-51.....(i)\end{aligned}$

$$ \boldsymbol{S}_r=26\left[\left(\frac{2^3}{3}\right) \cdot\left({ }^{12} \boldsymbol{C}_2\right)+\left(\frac{2^5}{5}\right) \cdot\left({ }^{12} \boldsymbol{C}_4\right)+\left(\frac{2^7}{7}\right) \cdot\left({ }^{12} \boldsymbol{C}_6\right)+\left(\frac{2^9}{9}\right) \cdot\left({ }^{12} \boldsymbol{C}_8\right)+\ldots .+\left(\frac{2^{13}}{13}\right) \cdot\left({ }^{12} \boldsymbol{C}_{12}\right)\right]=3^{13}-\boldsymbol{\alpha} \ldots . (ii)$$

From the equivalence relationship between equation $(\boldsymbol{i})$ and $(\boldsymbol{i i})$ we conclude $\alpha=51$

en.content: A person has three different bags and four different books. The number of ways, in which he can put these books in the bags so that no bag is empty, is :
en.explanation: Number of ways ( $\boldsymbol{n}$ ) $=\left({ }^4 C_2\right) \cdot\left({ }^3 C_1\right) \cdot(2) \cdot(1)=36$

en.content: If a straight line drawn through the point of intersection of the lines $4 x+3 y-1=0$ and $3 x+4 y-1=0$, meets the co-ordinate axes at the points P and Q , then the locus of the mid point of PQ is :
en.explanation:
1. 1. A straight line $\boldsymbol{L}$ passes through the point of intersection of 2 straight lines: $\left\{\begin{array}{l}\boldsymbol{L}_1: 4 \boldsymbol{x}+3 \boldsymbol{y}-1=0 \\ \boldsymbol{L}_2: 3 \boldsymbol{x}+4 \boldsymbol{y}-1=0\end{array}\right.$

  2. 2. The straight line $\boldsymbol{L}$ cuts the axes at $\boldsymbol{P}$ and $\boldsymbol{Q}$

  3. 3. To identify the locus of the mid-point of the segment $P Q$

  1. The point of intersection of $\boldsymbol{L}_1$ and $\boldsymbol{L}_2$ is $\boldsymbol{I}(\boldsymbol{\alpha}, \boldsymbol{\beta})$

  2. The mid-point of the segment $\boldsymbol{P Q}$ is $\boldsymbol{M}(\boldsymbol{h}, \boldsymbol{k})$

Analytical Study :

We first solve the pair of straight lines $\boldsymbol{L}_1$ and $\boldsymbol{L}_2$ to locate the point of intersection :

$$ \begin{aligned} & 4 x+3 y-1=0 \Rightarrow 12 x+9 y=3 \\ & 3 x+4 y-1=0 \Rightarrow 12 x+16 y=4 \end{aligned} \quad \Rightarrow \beta=\frac{1}{7} \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{\alpha}=\frac{1}{7} \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{I}\left(\frac{1}{7}, \frac{1}{7}\right) \ldots . . (i)$$

The straight line $\boldsymbol{L}$ passes through the point $\boldsymbol{I}$ identified by equation (i)

The equation of the straight line $\boldsymbol{L}$ in point slope form is written below :

$$ L:\left(y-\frac{1}{7}\right)=m\left(x-\frac{1}{7}\right) \equiv L: 7 m x-7 y=m-1 \equiv L: \frac{7 m x}{m-1}+\frac{7 y}{1-m}=1 \ldots . (ii)$$

The equation (ii) gives the straight line $\boldsymbol{L}$ in intercept form where the $\boldsymbol{X}$ and $\boldsymbol{Y}$ intercepts are observed below :

$$ \begin{aligned} &\begin{array}{|l|l|} \hline \boldsymbol{P} & \boldsymbol{Q} \\ \hline\left(\frac{\boldsymbol{m}-1}{7 \boldsymbol{m}}, 0\right) & \left(0, \frac{1-\boldsymbol{m}}{7}\right) \\ \hline \end{array}\text { ..... Chart } 1 \end{aligned} $$

From Chart 1, the mid-point of the section $\boldsymbol{P Q}$ is derived applying mid-point formulae :

$$ M(h, k)=M\left(\frac{m-1}{14 m}, \frac{1-m}{14}\right) \equiv \begin{array}{|l|l|l|} \hline \text { Point } & h & k \\ \hline M(h, k) & \frac{m-1}{14 m} & \frac{1-m}{14} \\ \hline \end{array} \quad \ldots . \text { Chart } 2 $$

Chart 2 has the $\boldsymbol{X}$ and $\boldsymbol{Y}$ coordinate each as a function of $\boldsymbol{m}$ where we can eliminate $\boldsymbol{m}$ and mathematically trace the locus :

$$ \boldsymbol{k}=\frac{1-\boldsymbol{m}}{14} \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{m}=1-14 \boldsymbol{k} \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{h}=\frac{1-14 \boldsymbol{k}-1}{14(1-14 \boldsymbol{k})}=\frac{14 \boldsymbol{k}}{14(14 \boldsymbol{k}-1)}=\frac{\boldsymbol{k}}{(14 \boldsymbol{k}-1)} \Rightarrow 14 \boldsymbol{h} \boldsymbol{k}-\boldsymbol{h}=\boldsymbol{k} \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{h}+\boldsymbol{k}-14 \boldsymbol{h} \boldsymbol{k}=0 $$

The locus of the mid-point of the section $\boldsymbol{P Q}$ after replacement of the dummy variables is found to be the rectangular hyperbola $\boldsymbol{x}+\boldsymbol{y}-14 \boldsymbol{x} \boldsymbol{y}=0 $

hi.content: यदि रेखाओं $4 x+3 y-1=0$ और $3 x+4 y-1=0$ के प्रतिच्छेदन बिंदु से खींची गई एक सरल रेखा, निर्देशांक अक्षों को बिंदुओं P और Q पर मिलती है, तो PQ के मध्य बिंदु का बिंदु पथ है :
hi.explanation:
1. 1. एक सरल रेखा $\boldsymbol{L}$, 2 सरल रेखाओं के प्रतिच्छेद बिंदु से होकर गुजरती है: $\left\{\begin{array}{l}\boldsymbol{L}_1: 4 \boldsymbol{x}+3 \boldsymbol{y}-1=0 \\ \boldsymbol{L}_2: 3 \boldsymbol{x}+4 \boldsymbol{y}-1=0\end{array}\right.$

  2. 2. सरल रेखा $\boldsymbol{L}$ अक्षों को $\boldsymbol{P}$ और $\boldsymbol{Q}$ पर काटती है

  3. 3. रेखाखंड $P Q$ के मध्य-बिंदु का बिंदुपथ (locus) ज्ञात करना है

  1. $\boldsymbol{L}_1$ और $\boldsymbol{L}_2$ का प्रतिच्छेद बिंदु $\boldsymbol{I}(\boldsymbol{\alpha}, \boldsymbol{\beta})$ है

  2. रेखाखंड $\boldsymbol{P Q}$ का मध्य-बिंदु $\boldsymbol{M}(\boldsymbol{h}, \boldsymbol{k})$ है

विश्लेषणात्मक अध्ययन :

हम सबसे पहले प्रतिच्छेद बिंदु ज्ञात करने के लिए सरल रेखाओं के युग्म $\boldsymbol{L}_1$ और $\boldsymbol{L}_2$ को हल करते हैं:

$$ \begin{aligned} & 4 x+3 y-1=0 \Rightarrow 12 x+9 y=3 \\ & 3 x+4 y-1=0 \Rightarrow 12 x+16 y=4 \end{aligned} \quad \Rightarrow \beta=\frac{1}{7} \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{\alpha}=\frac{1}{7} \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{I}\left(\frac{1}{7}, \frac{1}{7}\right) \ldots . . (i)$$

सरल रेखा $\boldsymbol{L}$, समीकरण (i) द्वारा पहचाने गए बिंदु $\boldsymbol{I}$ से होकर गुजरती है

बिंदु-ढाल रूप में सरल रेखा $\boldsymbol{L}$ का समीकरण नीचे दिया गया है:

$$ L:\left(y-\frac{1}{7}\right)=m\left(x-\frac{1}{7}\right) \equiv L: 7 m x-7 y=m-1 \equiv L: \frac{7 m x}{m-1}+\frac{7 y}{1-m}=1 \ldots . (ii)$$

समीकरण (ii) अंतःखंड रूप (intercept form) में सरल रेखा $\boldsymbol{L}$ प्रदान करता है जहाँ $\boldsymbol{X}$ और $\boldsymbol{Y}$ अंतःखंडों को नीचे देखा जा सकता है:

$$ \begin{aligned} &\begin{array}{|l|l|} \hline \boldsymbol{P} & \boldsymbol{Q} \\ \hline\left(\frac{\boldsymbol{m}-1}{7 \boldsymbol{m}}, 0\right) & \left(0, \frac{1-\boldsymbol{m}}{7}\right) \\ \hline \end{array}\text { ..... चार्ट } 1 \end{aligned} $$

चार्ट 1 से, मध्य-बिंदु सूत्र लागू करके रेखाखंड $\boldsymbol{P Q}$ का मध्य-बिंदु प्राप्त किया जाता है:

$$ M(h, k)=M\left(\frac{m-1}{14 m}, \frac{1-m}{14}\right) \equiv \begin{array}{|l|l|l|} \hline \text { बिंदु } & h & k \\ \hline M(h, k) & \frac{m-1}{14 m} & \frac{1-m}{14} \\ \hline \end{array} \quad \ldots . \text { चार्ट } 2 $$

चार्ट 2 में $\boldsymbol{X}$ और $\boldsymbol{Y}$ निर्देशांक प्रत्येक $\boldsymbol{m}$ के फलन के रूप में हैं जहाँ हम $\boldsymbol{m}$ को विलोपित (eliminate) कर सकते हैं और गणितीय रूप से बिंदुपथ ज्ञात कर सकते हैं:

$$ \boldsymbol{k}=\frac{1-\boldsymbol{m}}{14} \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{m}=1-14 \boldsymbol{k} \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{h}=\frac{1-14 \boldsymbol{k}-1}{14(1-14 \boldsymbol{k})}=\frac{14 \boldsymbol{k}}{14(14 \boldsymbol{k}-1)}=\frac{\boldsymbol{k}}{(14 \boldsymbol{k}-1)} \Rightarrow 14 \boldsymbol{h} \boldsymbol{k}-\boldsymbol{h}=\boldsymbol{k} \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{h}+\boldsymbol{k}-14 \boldsymbol{h} \boldsymbol{k}=0 $$

डमी चरों (dummy variables) को प्रतिस्थापित करने के बाद रेखाखंड $\boldsymbol{P Q}$ के मध्य-बिंदु का बिंदुपथ एक समकोणीय अतिपरवलय (rectangular hyperbola) $\boldsymbol{x}+\boldsymbol{y}-14 \boldsymbol{x} \boldsymbol{y}=0 $ प्राप्त होता है।

en.explanation: $\begin{aligned} & t_1 t_2=-4 \\ & 2 h=t_1^2+t_2^2 \quad 2 k=2\left(t_1+t_2\right) \\ & 2 h=k^2-2 t_1 t_2 \\ & 2 h=k^2+8 \\ & k^2=2 h-8 \\ & =2((h-4) \\ & \text { L.R. }=2\end{aligned}$

en.content:
Let $\alpha=3 \sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{6}{11}\right)$ and $\beta=3 \cos ^{-1}\left(\frac{4}{9}\right)$, where inverse trigonometric functions take only the principal values.

Given below are two statements :

Statement I : $\quad \cos (\alpha+\beta)>0$.

Statement II : $\quad \cos (\alpha)<0$.

In the light of the above statements, choose the correct answer from the options given below :

options.content: Both Statement I and Statement II are true
Both Statement I and Statement II are false
Statement I is true but Statement II is false
$$ \text { Statement I is false but Statement II is true } $$

en.explanation:
$\frac{1}{2}<\frac{6}{11}<\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \Rightarrow \sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)<\sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{6}{11}\right)<\sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)$ ....(i)

$$ \Rightarrow 3 \sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)<3 \sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{6}{11}\right)<3 \sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right) \Rightarrow \frac{\pi}{2}<\alpha<\frac{3 \pi}{4} \Rightarrow \cos \alpha<0 \ldots . . (ii) $$

$\frac{4}{9}<\frac{1}{2}<\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \Rightarrow \cos ^{-1}\left(\frac{4}{9}\right)>\frac{\pi}{3}>\frac{\pi}{4}$

$$ \Rightarrow 3 \cos ^{-1}\left(\frac{4}{9}\right)>\pi>\frac{3 \pi}{4} \Rightarrow \beta>\pi \ldots \ldots (ii) $$

Inequalities $(i)$ and $(i \boldsymbol{i})$ shows the mathematical logic for $\alpha+\beta>\frac{\pi}{2}+\pi$

$\Rightarrow \cos (\boldsymbol{\alpha}+\boldsymbol{\beta})>0 \ldots \ldots$ (iii)

From equations (i) and (iii) we can conclude :

$$ \begin{array}{|l|l|l|} \hline \text { Statement } & \text { I } & \text { II } \\ \hline \text { True } & \text { Yes } & \text { Yes } \\ \hline \end{array} $$

hi.content:
माना $\alpha=3 \sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{6}{11}\right)$ और $\beta=3 \cos ^{-1}\left(\frac{4}{9}\right)$ हैं, जहाँ प्रतिलोम त्रिकोणमितीय फलन केवल मुख्य मान लेते हैं। नीचे दो कथन दिए गए हैं :

कथन I: $\cos (\alpha+\beta)>0$ है।

कथन II : $\cos (\alpha)<0$ है।

उपर्युक्त कथनों के संदर्भ में, नीचे दिए गए विकल्पों में से सही उत्तर चुनें :

options.content: कथन I और कथन II दोनों सही हैं
कथन I और कथन II दोनों गलत हैं
कथन I सही है किन्तु कथन II गलत है
कथन I गलत है किन्तु कथन II सही है

$\frac{1}{2}<\frac{6}{11}<\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \Rightarrow \sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)<\sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{6}{11}\right)<\sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)$ ....(i)

$$ \Rightarrow 3 \sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)<3 \sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{6}{11}\right)<3 \sin ^{-1}\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right) \Rightarrow \frac{\pi}{2}<\alpha<\frac{3 \pi}{4} \Rightarrow \cos \alpha<0 \ldots . . (ii) $$

$\frac{4}{9}<\frac{1}{2}<\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \Rightarrow \cos ^{-1}\left(\frac{4}{9}\right)>\frac{\pi}{3}>\frac{\pi}{4}$

$$ \Rightarrow 3 \cos ^{-1}\left(\frac{4}{9}\right)>\pi>\frac{3 \pi}{4} \Rightarrow \beta>\pi \ldots \ldots (ii) $$

Inequalities $(i)$ and $(i \boldsymbol{i})$ shows the mathematical logic for $\alpha+\beta>\frac{\pi}{2}+\pi$

$\Rightarrow \cos (\boldsymbol{\alpha}+\boldsymbol{\beta})>0 \ldots \ldots$ (iii)

From equations (i) and (iii) we can conclude :

$$ \begin{array}{|l|l|l|} \hline \text { Statement } & \text { I } & \text { II } \\ \hline \text { True } & \text { Yes } & \text { Yes } \\ \hline \end{array} $$

en.content:
For the function $f(x)=\mathrm{e}^{\sin |x|}-|x|, x \in \mathbf{R}$, consider the following statements :

Statement I : $ f$ is differentiable for all $x \in \mathbf{R}$.

Statement II : $ f$ is increasing in $\left(-\pi,-\frac{\pi}{2}\right)$.

In the light of the above statements, choose the correct answer from the options given below :

options.content: Both Statement I and Statement II are true
Both Statement I and Statement II are false
Statement I is true but Statement II is false
Statement I is false but Statement II is true

en.explanation:
Here $f(x)=\mathrm{e}^{\sin |x|}-|x|$. Since $|x|$ is not differentiable at $x=0$, and also $\sin|x|$ has a “kink” at $x=0$, the function $f$ is not differentiable at $x=0$. So, Statement I is false.

Now take $x \in\left(-\pi,-\frac{\pi}{2}\right)$. Here $x<0$, so $|x|=-x$ and hence $\sin|x|=\sin(-x)=-\sin x$. Therefore, on this interval we can write $f(x)=\mathrm{e}^{-\sin x}+x$ and differentiate to check whether $f$ is increasing.

$$ \begin{aligned} & f(x)=e^{-\sin x}+x \\\\ & f^{\prime}(x)=-e^{-\sin x} \cos x+1 \\\\ & \text { for } x \in\left(-\pi, \frac{-\pi}{2}\right) \quad \cos x<0 \\\\ & \therefore f^{\prime}(x)>0 \\\\ & \therefore f(x) \text { is increasing } \end{aligned} $$

Since $\cos x<0$ on $\left(-\pi,-\frac{\pi}{2}\right)$ and $e^{-\sin x}>0$, we get $-e^{-\sin x}\cos x>0$, so $f'(x)>0$ on this interval. Hence, Statement II is true.

hi.content:
फलन $f(x)=\mathrm{e}^{\sin |x|}-|x|, x \in \mathbf{R}$ के लिए निम्न कथनों का विचार कीजिए :

कथन I: सभी $x \in \mathbf{R}$ के लिए, $f$ अवकलनीय है।

कथन II : $\left(-\pi,-\frac{\pi}{2}\right)$ में $f$ वर्धमान है।

उपर्युक्त कथनों के संदर्भ में, नीचे दिए गए विकल्पों में से सही उत्तर चुनें :

options.content: कथन I और कथन II दोनों सही हैं
कथन I और कथन II दोनों गलत हैं
कथन I सही है किन्तु कथन II गलत है
कथन I गलत है किन्तु कथन II सही है

hi.explanation:
यहाँ $f(x)=\mathrm{e}^{\sin |x|}-|x|$ है। चूँकि $|x|$, $x=0$ पर अवकलनीय नहीं है, तथा $\sin|x|$ का भी $x=0$ पर एक तीक्ष्ण मोड़ ("kink") है, इसलिए फलन $f$, $x=0$ पर अवकलनीय नहीं है। अतः, कथन I असत्य है।

अब $x \in\left(-\pi,-\frac{\pi}{2}\right)$ लें। यहाँ $x<0$ है, इसलिए $|x|=-x$ है तथा अतः $\sin|x|=\sin(-x)=-\sin x$ है। इसलिए, इस अंतराल पर हम $f(x)=\mathrm{e}^{-\sin x}+x$ लिख सकते हैं तथा यह जाँचने के लिए इसका अवकलन कर सकते हैं कि क्या $f$ वर्धमान है।

$$ \begin{aligned} & f(x)=e^{-\sin x}+x \\\\ & f^{\prime}(x)=-e^{-\sin x} \cos x+1 \\\\ & x \in\left(-\pi, \frac{-\pi}{2}\right) \text { के लिए } \quad \cos x<0 \\\\ & \therefore f^{\prime}(x)>0 \\\\ & \therefore f(x) \text { वर्धमान है } \end{aligned} $$

चूँकि $\left(-\pi,-\frac{\pi}{2}\right)$ पर \cos x<0$ तथा $e^{-\sin x}>0$ है, इसलिए हमें $-e^{-\sin x}\cos x>0$ प्राप्त होता है, अतः इस अंतराल पर $f'(x)>0$ है। इसलिए, कथन II सत्य है।

en.content:
Let $\overrightarrow{\mathrm{a}}=4 \hat{i}-\hat{j}+3 \hat{k}, \overrightarrow{\mathrm{~b}}=10 \hat{i}+2 \hat{j}-\hat{k}$ and a vector $\overrightarrow{\mathrm{c}}$ be such that $2(\overrightarrow{\mathrm{a}} \times \overrightarrow{\mathrm{b}})+3(\overrightarrow{\mathrm{~b}} \times \overrightarrow{\mathrm{c}})=\overrightarrow{0}$.

If $\overrightarrow{\mathrm{a}} \cdot \overrightarrow{\mathrm{c}}=15$, then $\overrightarrow{\mathrm{c}} \cdot(\hat{i}+\hat{j}-3 \hat{k})$ is equal to :
en.explanation:
The unknown vector $\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{c}}$ is represented in 3D: $\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{c}}=\boldsymbol{x} \hat{\boldsymbol{i}}+\boldsymbol{y} \hat{\boldsymbol{j}}+z \hat{\boldsymbol{k}}$

Cross product of 2 vectors $\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{a}}$ and $\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{b}}$ :

$$ (\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{a}} \times \overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{b}})=\left|\begin{array}{l|r|r} \hat{\boldsymbol{i}} & \hat{\boldsymbol{j}} & \hat{\boldsymbol{k}} \tag{i}\\ 4 & -1 & 3 \\ 10 & 2 & -1 \end{array}\right|=-5 \hat{\boldsymbol{i}}+34 \hat{j}+18 \hat{\boldsymbol{k}} \ldots . . (i)$$

Cross product of 2 vectors $\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{b}}$ and $\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{c}}$ :

$$ (\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{b}} \times \overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{c}})=\left|\begin{array}{l|l|r} \hat{i} & \hat{j} & \hat{k} \\ 10 & 2 & -1 \\ \boldsymbol{x} & \boldsymbol{y} & \boldsymbol{z} \end{array}\right|=(2 z+y) \hat{\boldsymbol{i}}-(10 z+\boldsymbol{x}) \hat{\boldsymbol{j}}+(10 \boldsymbol{y}-2 \boldsymbol{x}) \hat{\boldsymbol{k}} \ldots \ldots(\boldsymbol{i} \boldsymbol{i}) $$

We know, $2(\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b})+3(\boldsymbol{b} \times \boldsymbol{c})=0$

$\Rightarrow 2(-5 \hat{\boldsymbol{i}}+34 \hat{\boldsymbol{j}}+18 \hat{\boldsymbol{k}})+3\{(2 \boldsymbol{z}+\boldsymbol{y}) \hat{\boldsymbol{i}}-(10 \boldsymbol{z}+x) \hat{\boldsymbol{j}}+(10 \boldsymbol{y}-2 x) \hat{\boldsymbol{k}}\}=0$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $(6 z+3 y-10) \hat{i}+(68-30 z-3 x) j+(36+30 y-6 x) \hat{k}=0$

As individual vector components of a null vector are zero.

$\begin{aligned} \boldsymbol{x}-5 \boldsymbol{y} & =6 \ldots . \boldsymbol{P}_1 \\ \boldsymbol{y}+2 \boldsymbol{z} & =\frac{10}{3} \ldots . . \boldsymbol{P}_2 \\ 10 \boldsymbol{z}+\boldsymbol{x} & =\frac{68}{3} \ldots . \boldsymbol{P}_3\end{aligned}$

$(\vec{a}) \cdot(\vec{c})=15 \Rightarrow(4 \hat{i}-\hat{j}+3 \hat{k}) \cdot(x \hat{i}+y \hat{j}+z \hat{k})=4 x-y+3 z=15 \ldots \ldots(i v)$

Equation set $(i i i)$ is mathematically constructed to form a linear combination of 2 planes $\boldsymbol{P}_1$ and $\boldsymbol{P}_2$ generating the $3^{\text {rd }}$ plane $\boldsymbol{P}_3$ :

$$ \boldsymbol{x}-5 \boldsymbol{y}+(\boldsymbol{\lambda}) \cdot(\boldsymbol{y}+2 \boldsymbol{z})=\frac{68}{3} \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{\lambda}=5 \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{P}_1+5 \boldsymbol{P}_2=\boldsymbol{P}_3 \ldots \ldots(\boldsymbol{v}) $$

Equation ( $\boldsymbol{v}$ ) is conclusive in generating a family of planes $\left\{\boldsymbol{P}_1, \boldsymbol{P}_2, \boldsymbol{P}_3\right\}$ indicating infinite solutions for the system equation (iii)

We need an auxiliary equation provided through (iv) to render an unique solution for the vector $\vec{c}$ :

$\left[\begin{array}{rlrr}x-5 y & =6 & \ldots . & P_1 \\ y+2 z & =\frac{10}{3} & \ldots . & P_2 \\ 4 x-y+3 z & =15 & \ldots . & P_4\end{array}\right] \ldots .(v i)$

Equation (vi) can be solved using Determinants and Cramer's rule :

$$ \boldsymbol{\Delta}=\left|\begin{array}{r|r|r} 1 & -5 & 0 \tag{vii}\\ 0 & 1 & 2 \\ 4 & -1 & 3 \end{array}\right| \quad \leftarrow \quad \boldsymbol{R}_3=\boldsymbol{R}_3-4 \boldsymbol{R}_1=\left|\begin{array}{r|r|r} 1 & -5 & 0 \\ 0 & 1 & 2 \\ 0 & 19 & 3 \end{array}\right|=-35 \quad \ldots . . (vii)$$

$\Delta_x=\left|\begin{array}{|l|r|l|}6 & -5 & 0 \\ \frac{10}{3} & 1 & 2 \\ 15 & -1 & 3\end{array}\right|$

$\begin{aligned} & \boldsymbol{R}_1=\boldsymbol{R}_1+5 \boldsymbol{R}_2 \\ & \boldsymbol{R}_3=\boldsymbol{R}_3+\boldsymbol{R}_2\end{aligned}$

$=\left|\begin{array}{|c|c|c|}\frac{68}{3} & 0 & 10 \\ \frac{10}{3} & 1 & 2 \\ \frac{55}{3} & 0 & 5\end{array}\right|$

$C_1 \leftrightarrows C_2$

$=-\left|\begin{array}{l|l}0 & \frac{68}{3} \\ 1 & \frac{10}{3} \\ 0 & \frac{10}{3} \\ \frac{55}{3}\end{array}\right|=\left(\frac{68}{3}\right) \cdot(5)-\left(\frac{55}{3}\right) \cdot(10)=-70 \ldots \ldots(v i i i)$

Equations $(\boldsymbol{v i i}),(\boldsymbol{v i i i}),(\boldsymbol{i x})$ and $(\boldsymbol{x})$ provides the solution to system equation $(\boldsymbol{v i})$ from Cramer's rule :

$\left[\begin{array}{l}x=\frac{\Delta_x}{\Delta}=\frac{70}{35}= \\ y=\frac{\Delta_y}{\Delta}=-\frac{28}{35}=-\frac{4}{5} \\ z=\frac{\Delta_z}{\Delta}=\frac{217}{(3) \cdot(35)}=\frac{31}{15}\end{array}\right]$

$\Rightarrow \overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{c}}=(2) \hat{\boldsymbol{i}}-\left(\frac{4}{5}\right) \hat{\boldsymbol{j}}+\left(\frac{31}{15}\right) \hat{\boldsymbol{k}}$

$\begin{aligned} & \therefore(\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{c}}) \cdot(\hat{\boldsymbol{i}}+\hat{j}-3 \hat{\boldsymbol{k}}) \\ & =\left\{(2) \hat{i}-\left(\frac{4}{5}\right) \hat{j}+\left(\frac{31}{15}\right) \hat{k}\right\} \cdot(\hat{\boldsymbol{i}}+\hat{j}-3 \hat{\boldsymbol{k}}) \\ & =2-\frac{4}{5}-\frac{31}{5}\end{aligned}$

$=-\frac{4+31-10}{5} =-5$

hi.content: माना $\overrightarrow{\mathrm{a}}=4 \hat{i}-\hat{j}+3 \hat{k}, \overrightarrow{\mathrm{~b}}=10 \hat{i}+2 \hat{j}-\hat{k}$ और एक सदिश $\overrightarrow{\mathrm{c}}$ इस प्रकार हैं कि $2(\overrightarrow{\mathrm{a}} \times \overrightarrow{\mathrm{b}})+3(\overrightarrow{\mathrm{~b}} \times \overrightarrow{\mathrm{c}})=\overrightarrow{0}$ है। यदि $\overrightarrow{\mathrm{a}} \cdot \overrightarrow{\mathrm{c}}=15$ है, तो $\overrightarrow{\mathrm{c}} \cdot(\hat{i}+\hat{j}-3 \hat{k})$ बराबर है :
hi.explanation:
अज्ञात सदिश $\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{c}}$ को 3D में इस प्रकार दर्शाया गया है: $\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{c}}=\boldsymbol{x} \hat{\boldsymbol{i}}+\boldsymbol{y} \hat{\boldsymbol{j}}+z \hat{\boldsymbol{k}}$

2 सदिशों $\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{a}}$ और $\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{b}}$ का सदिश गुणनफल :

$$ (\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{a}} \times \overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{b}})=\left|\begin{array}{l|r|r} \hat{\boldsymbol{i}} & \hat{\boldsymbol{j}} & \hat{\boldsymbol{k}} \tag{i}\\ 4 & -1 & 3 \\ 10 & 2 & -1 \end{array}\right|=-5 \hat{\boldsymbol{i}}+34 \hat{j}+18 \hat{\boldsymbol{k}} \ldots . . (i)$$

2 सदिशों $\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{b}}$ और $\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{c}}$ का सदिश गुणनफल :

$$ (\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{b}} \times \overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{c}})=\left|\begin{array}{l|l|r} \hat{i} & \hat{j} & \hat{k} \\ 10 & 2 & -1 \\ \boldsymbol{x} & \boldsymbol{y} & \boldsymbol{z} \end{array}\right|=(2 z+y) \hat{\boldsymbol{i}}-(10 z+\boldsymbol{x}) \hat{\boldsymbol{j}}+(10 \boldsymbol{y}-2 \boldsymbol{x}) \hat{\boldsymbol{k}} \ldots \ldots(\boldsymbol{i} \boldsymbol{i}) $$

हम जानते हैं कि, $2(\boldsymbol{a} \times \boldsymbol{b})+3(\boldsymbol{b} \times \boldsymbol{c})=0$

$\Rightarrow 2(-5 \hat{\boldsymbol{i}}+34 \hat{\boldsymbol{j}}+18 \hat{\boldsymbol{k}})+3\{(2 \boldsymbol{z}+\boldsymbol{y}) \hat{\boldsymbol{i}}-(10 \boldsymbol{z}+x) \hat{\boldsymbol{j}}+(10 \boldsymbol{y}-2 x) \hat{\boldsymbol{k}}\}=0$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $(6 z+3 y-10) \hat{i}+(68-30 z-3 x) j+(36+30 y-6 x) \hat{k}=0$

चूंकि एक शून्य सदिश के प्रत्येक सदिश घटक शून्य होते हैं।

$\begin{aligned} \boldsymbol{x}-5 \boldsymbol{y} & =6 \ldots . \boldsymbol{P}_1 \\ \boldsymbol{y}+2 \boldsymbol{z} & =\frac{10}{3} \ldots . . \boldsymbol{P}_2 \\ 10 \boldsymbol{z}+\boldsymbol{x} & =\frac{68}{3} \ldots . \boldsymbol{P}_3\end{aligned}$

$(\vec{a}) \cdot(\vec{c})=15 \Rightarrow(4 \hat{i}-\hat{j}+3 \hat{k}) \cdot(x \hat{i}+y \hat{j}+z \hat{k})=4 x-y+3 z=15 \ldots \ldots(i v)$

समीकरण निकाय $(i i i)$ को 2 तलों $\boldsymbol{P}_1$ और $\boldsymbol{P}_2$ का रैखिक संयोजन बनाने के लिए गणितीय रूप से निर्मित किया गया है, जो तीसरे तल $\boldsymbol{P}_3$ को उत्पन्न करता है :

$$ \boldsymbol{x}-5 \boldsymbol{y}+(\boldsymbol{\lambda}) \cdot(\boldsymbol{y}+2 \boldsymbol{z})=\frac{68}{3} \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{\lambda}=5 \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{P}_1+5 \boldsymbol{P}_2=\boldsymbol{P}_3 \ldots \ldots(\boldsymbol{v}) $$

समीकरण ( $\boldsymbol{v}$ ) तलों के एक कुल (family of planes) $\left\{\boldsymbol{P}_1, \boldsymbol{P}_2, \boldsymbol{P}_3\right\}$ को उत्पन्न करने में निर्णायक है जो निकाय समीकरण (iii) के लिए अनंत हल इंगित करता है।

सदिश $\vec{c}$ के लिए एक अद्वितीय हल प्राप्त करने के लिए हमें (iv) के माध्यम से प्रदान किए गए एक सहायक समीकरण की आवश्यकता है :

$\left[\begin{array}{rlrr}x-5 y & =6 & \ldots . & P_1 \\ y+2 z & =\frac{10}{3} & \ldots . & P_2 \\ 4 x-y+3 z & =15 & \ldots . & P_4\end{array}\right] \ldots .(v i)$

समीकरण (vi) को सारणिक (Determinants) और क्रेमर के नियम (Cramer's rule) का उपयोग करके हल किया जा सकता है :

$$ \boldsymbol{\Delta}=\left|\begin{array}{r|r|r} 1 & -5 & 0 \tag{vii}\\ 0 & 1 & 2 \\ 4 & -1 & 3 \end{array}\right| \quad \leftarrow \quad \boldsymbol{R}_3=\boldsymbol{R}_3-4 \boldsymbol{R}_1=\left|\begin{array}{r|r|r} 1 & -5 & 0 \\ 0 & 1 & 2 \\ 0 & 19 & 3 \end{array}\right|=-35 \quad \ldots . . (vii)$$

$\Delta_x=\left|\begin{array}{|l|r|l|}6 & -5 & 0 \\ \frac{10}{3} & 1 & 2 \\ 15 & -1 & 3\end{array}\right|$

$\begin{aligned} & \boldsymbol{R}_1=\boldsymbol{R}_1+5 \boldsymbol{R}_2 \\ & \boldsymbol{R}_3=\boldsymbol{R}_3+\boldsymbol{R}_2\end{aligned}$

$=\left|\begin{array}{|c|c|c|}\frac{68}{3} & 0 & 10 \\ \frac{10}{3} & 1 & 2 \\ \frac{55}{3} & 0 & 5\end{array}\right|$

$C_1 \leftrightarrows C_2$

$=-\left|\begin{array}{l|l}0 & \frac{68}{3} \\ 1 & \frac{10}{3} \\ 0 & \frac{10}{3} \\ \frac{55}{3}\end{array}\right|=\left(\frac{68}{3}\right) \cdot(5)-\left(\frac{55}{3}\right) \cdot(10)=-70 \ldots \ldots(v i i i)$

समीकरण $(\boldsymbol{v i i}),(\boldsymbol{v i i i}),(\boldsymbol{i x})$ और $(\boldsymbol{x})$ क्रेमर के नियम से निकाय समीकरण $(\boldsymbol{v i})$ का हल प्रदान करते हैं :

$\left[\begin{array}{l}x=\frac{\Delta_x}{\Delta}=\frac{70}{35}= \\ y=\frac{\Delta_y}{\Delta}=-\frac{28}{35}=-\frac{4}{5} \\ z=\frac{\Delta_z}{\Delta}=\frac{217}{(3) \cdot(35)}=\frac{31}{15}\end{array}\right]$

$\Rightarrow \overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{c}}=(2) \hat{\boldsymbol{i}}-\left(\frac{4}{5}\right) \hat{\boldsymbol{j}}+\left(\frac{31}{15}\right) \hat{\boldsymbol{k}}$

$\begin{aligned} & \therefore(\overrightarrow{\boldsymbol{c}}) \cdot(\hat{\boldsymbol{i}}+\hat{j}-3 \hat{\boldsymbol{k}}) \\ & =\left\{(2) \hat{i}-\left(\frac{4}{5}\right) \hat{j}+\left(\frac{31}{15}\right) \hat{k}\right\} \cdot(\hat{\boldsymbol{i}}+\hat{j}-3 \hat{\boldsymbol{k}}) \\ & =2-\frac{4}{5}-\frac{31}{5}\end{aligned}$

$=-\frac{4+31-10}{5} =-5$

en.content: Let the foot of perpendicular from the point $(\lambda, 2,3)$ on the line $\frac{x-4}{1}=\frac{y-9}{2}=\frac{z-5}{1}$ be the point ( $1, \mu, 2$ ). Then the distance between the lines $\frac{x-1}{2}=\frac{y-2}{3}=\frac{z+4}{6}$ and $\frac{x-\lambda}{2}=\frac{y-\mu}{3}=\frac{z+5}{6}$ is equal to :
en.explanation:
$\frac{x-4}{1}=\frac{y-9}{2}=\frac{z-5}{1}$

$\mathrm{Q}(1, \mu, 2)$ satisfies the line L

$$ \therefore \frac{1-4}{1}=\frac{\mu-9}{2}=\frac{2-5}{1} $$

$$ \Rightarrow-3=\frac{\mu-9}{2}=-3 \quad \Rightarrow \mu=3 $$

D.R. of PQ : $\lambda-1,2-\mu, 1$

Since $\mathrm{PQ} \perp \mathrm{L} \Rightarrow(\lambda-1) .1+2(2-\mu)+1.1=0$

$$ \Rightarrow \lambda-2 \mu+4=0 \quad \therefore \lambda=2 $$

Now lines : $\frac{x-1}{2}=\frac{y-2}{3}=\frac{z+4}{6}$ \&

$$ \frac{x-2}{2}=\frac{y-3}{3}=\frac{z+5}{6} $$

$\begin{aligned} & \text { i.e. } \vec{r}=(\hat{i}+2 \hat{j}-4 \hat{k})+t_1(2 \hat{i}+3 \hat{j}+6 \hat{k}) \\ & \& \vec{r}=(2 \hat{i}+3 \hat{j}-5 \hat{k})+t_2(2 \hat{i}+3 \hat{j}+6 \hat{k})\end{aligned}$

Distance

$$ \begin{aligned} & =\frac{|((\hat{i}+2 \hat{j}-4 \hat{k})-(2 \hat{i}+3 \hat{j}-5 \hat{k})) \times(2 \hat{i}+3 \hat{j}+6 \hat{k})|}{|2 \hat{i}+3 \hat{j}+6 \hat{k}|} \\ & =\frac{|-9 \hat{i}+8 \hat{j}-\hat{k}|}{7}=\frac{\sqrt{146}}{7} \end{aligned} $$

hi.content: माना रेखा $\frac{x-4}{1}=\frac{y-9}{2}=\frac{z-5}{1}$ पर बिंदु $(\lambda, 2,3)$ से डाले गए लंब का पाद बिंदु $(1, \mu, 2)$ है। तो रेखाओं $\frac{x-1}{2}=\frac{y-2}{3}=\frac{z+4}{6}$ और $\frac{x-\lambda}{2}=\frac{y-\mu}{3}=\frac{z+5}{6}$ के बीच दूरी है :
hi.explanation:
$\frac{x-4}{1}=\frac{y-9}{2}=\frac{z-5}{1}$

$\mathrm{Q}(1, \mu, 2)$ रेखा L को संतुष्ट करता है

$$ \therefore \frac{1-4}{1}=\frac{\mu-9}{2}=\frac{2-5}{1} $$

$$ \Rightarrow-3=\frac{\mu-9}{2}=-3 \quad \Rightarrow \mu=3 $$

PQ के दिक्-अनुपात : $\lambda-1,2-\mu, 1$

चूँकि $\mathrm{PQ} \perp \mathrm{L} \Rightarrow(\lambda-1) .1+2(2-\mu)+1.1=0$

$$ \Rightarrow \lambda-2 \mu+4=0 \quad \therefore \lambda=2 $$

अब रेखाएँ : $\frac{x-1}{2}=\frac{y-2}{3}=\frac{z+4}{6}$ और

$$ \frac{x-2}{2}=\frac{y-3}{3}=\frac{z+5}{6} $$

$\begin{aligned} & \text { अर्थात् } \vec{r}=(\hat{i}+2 \hat{j}-4 \hat{k})+t_1(2 \hat{i}+3 \hat{j}+6 \hat{k}) \\ & \& \vec{r}=(2 \hat{i}+3 \hat{j}-5 \hat{k})+t_2(2 \hat{i}+3 \hat{j}+6 \hat{k})\end{aligned}$

दूरी

$$ \begin{aligned} & =\frac{|((\hat{i}+2 \hat{j}-4 \hat{k})-(2 \hat{i}+3 \hat{j}-5 \hat{k})) \times(2 \hat{i}+3 \hat{j}+6 \hat{k})|}{|2 \hat{i}+3 \hat{j}+6 \hat{k}|} \\ & =\frac{|-9 \hat{i}+8 \hat{j}-\hat{k}|}{7}=\frac{\sqrt{146}}{7} \end{aligned} $$

en.content: The value of the integral $\int\limits_0^2 \frac{\sqrt{x\left(x^2+x+1\right)}}{(\sqrt{x+1})\left(\sqrt{x^4+x^2+1}\right)} \mathrm{d} x$ is equal to:
en.explanation:
$I=\int\limits_0^2\left[\frac{\sqrt{x\left(x^2+x+1\right)}}{(\sqrt{x+1}) \cdot\left(\sqrt{x^4+x^2+1}\right)}\right] d x$

$\begin{aligned} & =\int_0^2\left[\frac{\sqrt{x\left(x^2+x+1\right)}}{(\sqrt{x+1}) \cdot\left(\sqrt{x^4+2 x^2+1-x^2}\right)}\right] d x \\ & =\int_0^2\left[\frac{\sqrt{x\left(x^2+x+1\right)}}{(\sqrt{x+1}) \cdot\left(\sqrt{\left(x^2+1\right)^2-x^2}\right)}\right] d x \\ & =\int_0^2\left[\frac{\sqrt{x\left(x^2+x+1\right)}}{\left.(\sqrt{x+1}) \cdot\left\{\sqrt{\left(x^2+1+x\right)\left(x^2+1-x\right)}\right\}\right]}\right] d x \\ & =\int_0^2\left[\frac{(\sqrt{x}) \cdot\left(\sqrt{x^2+x+1}\right)}{(\sqrt{x+1}) \cdot\left(\sqrt{x^2+1+x}\right) \cdot\left(\sqrt{x^2+1-x}\right)}\right] d x \\ & =\int_0^2\left[\frac{\sqrt{x}}{(\sqrt{x+1}) \cdot\left(\sqrt{x^2-x+1}\right)}\right] d x \\ & =\int_0^2\left[\frac{\sqrt{x}}{\sqrt{(x+1)\left(x^2-x+1\right)}}\right] d x \\ & =\int_0^2\left[\frac{\sqrt{x}}{\sqrt{x^3+1}}\right] d x\end{aligned}$

Let $x=t^2 \Rightarrow d x=2 t d t$

$\boldsymbol{I}=\int_0^{\sqrt{2}}\left[\frac{2 t^2}{\sqrt{t^6+1}}\right] d t=\left(\frac{2}{3}\right) \int_0^{\sqrt{2}}\left[\frac{3 t^2}{\sqrt{t^6+1}}\right] d t$

Let $t^3=u \Rightarrow 3 t^2 d t=d u$

$\boldsymbol{I}=\left(\frac{2}{3}\right)^2 \cdot \int_0^{2 \sqrt{2}}\left[\frac{\boldsymbol{d u}}{\sqrt{u^2+1}}\right]$

Using standard integration formulaes :

$\int\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}\right) \boldsymbol{d x}=\ln \left|\boldsymbol{x}+\sqrt{\boldsymbol{x}^2+\boldsymbol{a}^2}\right|+C$

= $\left(\frac{2}{3}\right) \cdot\left[\ln \left|\boldsymbol{u}+\sqrt{\boldsymbol{u}^2+1}\right|\right]_0^{2 \sqrt{2}}$

$=\left(\frac{2}{3}\right) \cdot[\ln (2 \sqrt{2}+3)-\ln 1]=\left(\frac{2}{3}\right) \cdot[\ln (3+2 \sqrt{2})]$

hi.content: समाकलन $\int_0^2 \frac{\sqrt{x\left(x^2+x+1\right)}}{(\sqrt{x+1})\left(\sqrt{x^4+x^2+1}\right)} \mathrm{d} x$ का मान बराबर है :
hi.explanation:
$I=\int\limits_0^2\left[\frac{\sqrt{x\left(x^2+x+1\right)}}{(\sqrt{x+1}) \cdot\left(\sqrt{x^4+x^2+1}\right)}\right] d x$

$\begin{aligned} & =\int_0^2\left[\frac{\sqrt{x\left(x^2+x+1\right)}}{(\sqrt{x+1}) \cdot\left(\sqrt{x^4+2 x^2+1-x^2}\right)}\right] d x \\ & =\int_0^2\left[\frac{\sqrt{x\left(x^2+x+1\right)}}{(\sqrt{x+1}) \cdot\left(\sqrt{\left(x^2+1\right)^2-x^2}\right)}\right] d x \\ & =\int_0^2\left[\frac{\sqrt{x\left(x^2+x+1\right)}}{\left.(\sqrt{x+1}) \cdot\left\{\sqrt{\left(x^2+1+x\right)\left(x^2+1-x\right)}\right\}\right]}\right] d x \\ & =\int_0^2\left[\frac{(\sqrt{x}) \cdot\left(\sqrt{x^2+x+1}\right)}{(\sqrt{x+1}) \cdot\left(\sqrt{x^2+1+x}\right) \cdot\left(\sqrt{x^2+1-x}\right)}\right] d x \\ & =\int_0^2\left[\frac{\sqrt{x}}{(\sqrt{x+1}) \cdot\left(\sqrt{x^2-x+1}\right)}\right] d x \\ & =\int_0^2\left[\frac{\sqrt{x}}{\sqrt{(x+1)\left(x^2-x+1\right)}}\right] d x \\ & =\int_0^2\left[\frac{\sqrt{x}}{\sqrt{x^3+1}}\right] d x\end{aligned}$

माना $x=t^2 \Rightarrow d x=2 t d t$

$\boldsymbol{I}=\int_0^{\sqrt{2}}\left[\frac{2 t^2}{\sqrt{t^6+1}}\right] d t=\left(\frac{2}{3}\right) \int_0^{\sqrt{2}}\left[\frac{3 t^2}{\sqrt{t^6+1}}\right] d t$

माना $t^3=u \Rightarrow 3 t^2 d t=d u$

$\boldsymbol{I}=\left(\frac{2}{3}\right)^2 \cdot \int_0^{2 \sqrt{2}}\left[\frac{\boldsymbol{d u}}{\sqrt{u^2+1}}\right]$

मानक समाकलन सूत्रों का उपयोग करने पर :

$\int\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{x^2+a^2}}\right) \boldsymbol{d x}=\ln \left|\boldsymbol{x}+\sqrt{\boldsymbol{x}^2+\boldsymbol{a}^2}\right|+C$

= $\left(\frac{2}{3}\right) \cdot\left[\ln \left|\boldsymbol{u}+\sqrt{\boldsymbol{u}^2+1}\right|\right]_0^{2 \sqrt{2}}$

$=\left(\frac{2}{3}\right) \cdot[\ln (2 \sqrt{2}+3)-\ln 1]=\left(\frac{2}{3}\right) \cdot[\ln (3+2 \sqrt{2})]$

en.excerpt: The value of the integral $\int\limits_0^2 \frac{\sqrt{x\left(x^2+x+1\right)}}{(\sqrt{x+1})\left(\sqrt{x^4+x^2+1}\right)} \mathrm{d} x$ is equal to:

hi.title: JEE Main 2026 (Online) 8th April Evening Shift
hi.subTitle: Definite Integration • Mathematics
hi.excerpt: समाकलन $\int_0^2 \frac{\sqrt{x\left(x^2+x+1\right)}}{(\sqrt{x+1})\left(\sqrt{x^4+x^2+1}\right)} \mathrm{d} x$ का मान बराबर है :

en.content: Let $y=y(x)$ be the solution of the differential equation $x \sqrt{1-x^2} d y+\left(y \sqrt{1-x^2}-x \cos ^{-1} x\right) d x=0, x \in(0,1), \lim _{x \rightarrow 1^{-}} y(x)=1$. Then $y\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)$ equals :
en.explanation:
$\left(x \sqrt{1-x^2}\right) d y+\left(y \sqrt{1-x^2}-x \cos ^{-1} x\right) d x=0$

$\Rightarrow\left(x \sqrt{1-x^2}\right) \frac{d y}{d x}+\left(y \sqrt{1-x^2}-x \cos ^{-1} x\right)=0$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $\frac{d y}{d x}+\frac{\left(y \sqrt{1-x^2}-x \cos ^{-1} x\right)}{\left(x \sqrt{1-x^2}\right)}=0$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $$ \frac{d y}{d x}+\frac{y}{x}=\frac{\cos ^{-1} x}{\sqrt{1-x^2}} \ldots . $$(i)

Bernoulli's linear ODE of first order :

$\frac{d y}{d x}+P(x) \cdot y=Q(x)$ having $\boldsymbol{I} \cdot \boldsymbol{F}=\boldsymbol{e}^{\int \boldsymbol{P}(\boldsymbol{x}) \boldsymbol{d} \boldsymbol{x}}$

$$ \begin{array}{|l|l|} \hline \boldsymbol{P}(\boldsymbol{x}) & \boldsymbol{Q}(\boldsymbol{x}) \\ \hline \frac{1}{\boldsymbol{x}} & \frac{\cos ^{-1} \boldsymbol{x}}{\sqrt{1-\boldsymbol{x}^2}} \\ \hline \end{array} $$

$$ \Rightarrow I . F=e^{\int P(x) d x}=e^{\int \frac{d x}{x}}=e^{\ln x}=x \ldots . . (ii)$$

Apply the I.F from equation $(i i)$ in $\mathrm{ODE}(i)$ :

$$ \text { - } x \frac{d y}{d x}+y=\frac{x \cos ^{-1} x}{\sqrt{1-x^2}} \Rightarrow x d y+y d x=\left(\frac{x \cos ^{-1} x}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) d x $$

$$ \Rightarrow d(x y)=\left(\frac{x \cos ^{-1} x}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) d x \Rightarrow \int d(x y)=\int\left(\frac{x \cos ^{-1} x}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) d x \ldots . .(iii) $$

We choose the first and second functions

$$ \begin{aligned} &\begin{array}{|l|l|} \hline \boldsymbol{u} & \boldsymbol{v} \\ \hline \cos ^{-1} \boldsymbol{x} & \frac{\boldsymbol{x}}{\sqrt{1-x^2}} \\ \hline \end{array}\\ &\text { for the integrand in equation }(\boldsymbol{i} \boldsymbol{i} \boldsymbol{i}) \text { to proceed further: } \end{aligned} $$

$\begin{aligned} x y & =\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \int\left(\frac{x}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) d x+\int\left[\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) \cdot \int\left(\frac{x}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) d x\right] d x \\ & =-\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \sqrt{1-x^2}-\int\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) \cdot\left(\sqrt{1-x^2}\right) d x \\ & =-\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \sqrt{1-x^2}-\int\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) \cdot\left(\sqrt{1-x^2}\right) d x \\ & =-\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \sqrt{1-x^2}-\int d x \\ & =-\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \sqrt{1-x^2}-x+C\end{aligned}$

$y(x)=\frac{C}{x}-1-\frac{\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \sqrt{1-x^2}}{x} \ldots .(i v)$ where $C$ is the arbitrary constant

$\lim\limits_{x \rightarrow 1^{-}} y(x)=\lim\limits_{x \rightarrow 1^{-}}\left[\frac{C}{x}-1-\frac{\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \sqrt{1-x^2}}{x}\right]=C-1-\frac{(0) \cdot(0)}{1}=C-1 \ldots \ldots(v)$

We have the boundary condition

$\lim\limits_{\boldsymbol{x} \rightarrow 1^{-}} \boldsymbol{y}(\boldsymbol{x})=1 \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{C}=2 \ldots . .(\boldsymbol{v} \boldsymbol{i}) \leftarrow$ From equation $(\boldsymbol{v})$

We have solved the ODE to reach a particular solution $(\boldsymbol{C}=2)$ from $(\boldsymbol{i v}) y(x)=\frac{2}{x}-1-\frac{\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \sqrt{1-x^2}}{x} \ldots$. (vii)

Substitute $\boldsymbol{x}=\frac{1}{2}$ in equation (vii) to evaluate $\boldsymbol{y}\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)=4-1-(\boldsymbol{\mathcal { 2 }}) \cdot\left(\frac{\boldsymbol{\pi}}{3}\right) \cdot\left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{\boldsymbol{\mathcal { 2 }}}\right)$

$=3-\frac{\pi}{\sqrt{3}}$

hi.content: माना अवकल समीकरण $x \sqrt{1-x^2} d y+\left(y \sqrt{1-x^2}-x \cos ^{-1} x\right) d x=0, x \in(0,1), \lim _{x \rightarrow 1^{-}} y(x)=1$, का हल $y=y(x)$ है। तो $y\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)$ बराबर है :
hi.explanation:
$\left(x \sqrt{1-x^2}\right) d y+\left(y \sqrt{1-x^2}-x \cos ^{-1} x\right) d x=0$

$\Rightarrow\left(x \sqrt{1-x^2}\right) \frac{d y}{d x}+\left(y \sqrt{1-x^2}-x \cos ^{-1} x\right)=0$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $\frac{d y}{d x}+\frac{\left(y \sqrt{1-x^2}-x \cos ^{-1} x\right)}{\left(x \sqrt{1-x^2}\right)}=0$

$$\Rightarrow $$ $$ \frac{d y}{d x}+\frac{y}{x}=\frac{\cos ^{-1} x}{\sqrt{1-x^2}} \ldots . $$(i)

बर्नोली का प्रथम कोटि का रैखिक अवकल समीकरण (ODE) :

$\frac{d y}{d x}+P(x) \cdot y=Q(x)$ जिसमें $\boldsymbol{I} \cdot \boldsymbol{F}=\boldsymbol{e}^{\int \boldsymbol{P}(\boldsymbol{x}) \boldsymbol{d} \boldsymbol{x}}$ है

$$ \begin{array}{|l|l|} \hline \boldsymbol{P}(\boldsymbol{x}) & \boldsymbol{Q}(\boldsymbol{x}) \\ \hline \frac{1}{\boldsymbol{x}} & \frac{\cos ^{-1} \boldsymbol{x}}{\sqrt{1-\boldsymbol{x}^2}} \\ \hline \end{array} $$

$$ \Rightarrow I . F=e^{\int P(x) d x}=e^{\int \frac{d x}{x}}=e^{\ln x}=x \ldots . . (ii)$$

समीकरण $(i i)$ से I.F. का मान $\mathrm{ODE}(i)$ में रखने पर :

$$ \text { - } x \frac{d y}{d x}+y=\frac{x \cos ^{-1} x}{\sqrt{1-x^2}} \Rightarrow x d y+y d x=\left(\frac{x \cos ^{-1} x}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) d x $$

$$ \Rightarrow d(x y)=\left(\frac{x \cos ^{-1} x}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) d x \Rightarrow \int d(x y)=\int\left(\frac{x \cos ^{-1} x}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) d x \ldots . .(iii) $$

हम प्रथम और द्वितीय फलन चुनते हैं

$$ \begin{aligned} &\begin{array}{|l|l|} \hline \boldsymbol{u} & \boldsymbol{v} \\ \hline \cos ^{-1} \boldsymbol{x} & \frac{\boldsymbol{x}}{\sqrt{1-x^2}} \\ \hline \end{array}\\ &\text { समीकरण }(\boldsymbol{i} \boldsymbol{i} \boldsymbol{i}) \text { में समाकल्य (integrand) के लिए, आगे हल करने हेतु: } \end{aligned} $$

$\begin{aligned} x y & =\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \int\left(\frac{x}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) d x+\int\left[\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) \cdot \int\left(\frac{x}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) d x\right] d x \\ & =-\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \sqrt{1-x^2}-\int\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) \cdot\left(\sqrt{1-x^2}\right) d x \\ & =-\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \sqrt{1-x^2}-\int\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{1-x^2}}\right) \cdot\left(\sqrt{1-x^2}\right) d x \\ & =-\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \sqrt{1-x^2}-\int d x \\ & =-\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \sqrt{1-x^2}-x+C\end{aligned}$

$y(x)=\frac{C}{x}-1-\frac{\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \sqrt{1-x^2}}{x} \ldots .(i v)$ जहाँ $C$ एक स्वेच्छ अचर (arbitrary constant) है

$\lim\limits_{x \rightarrow 1^{-}} y(x)=\lim\limits_{x \rightarrow 1^{-}}\left[\frac{C}{x}-1-\frac{\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \sqrt{1-x^2}}{x}\right]=C-1-\frac{(0) \cdot(0)}{1}=C-1 \ldots \ldots(v)$

हमारे पास परिसीमा प्रतिबंध (boundary condition) है

$\lim\limits_{\boldsymbol{x} \rightarrow 1^{-}} \boldsymbol{y}(\boldsymbol{x})=1 \Rightarrow \boldsymbol{C}=2 \ldots . .(\boldsymbol{v} \boldsymbol{i}) \leftarrow$ समीकरण $(\boldsymbol{v})$ से

हमने $(\boldsymbol{i v})$ से एक विशिष्ट हल $(\boldsymbol{C}=2)$ प्राप्त करने के लिए अवकल समीकरण को हल किया है, जिससे $y(x)=\frac{2}{x}-1-\frac{\left(\cos ^{-1} x\right) \cdot \sqrt{1-x^2}}{x} \ldots$. (vii)

$\boldsymbol{y}\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)$ का मान ज्ञात करने के लिए समीकरण (vii) में $\boldsymbol{x}=\frac{1}{2}$ रखने पर $\boldsymbol{y}\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)=4-1-(\boldsymbol{\mathcal { 2 }}) \cdot\left(\frac{\boldsymbol{\pi}}{3}\right) \cdot\left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{\boldsymbol{\mathcal { 2 }}}\right)$

$=3-\frac{\pi}{\sqrt{3}}$
